We derive a hydrodynamic description through a coarse-graining procedure, and show that it qualitatively captures the main collective states of the microscopic dynamics. Overall, our model provides key insights into how an active anisotropic deformation yields waves that self-organize into various dynamical patterns.
summary: 捕获可收缩活体组织中变形波的出现是一项挑战，最近已通过主动可变形粒子模型来解决。受心脏组织中心肌细胞各向异性变形的启发，我们研究了椭圆粒子的脉动如何影响其在致密组件中的集体特性。我们引入了两种类型的变形，其中每个粒子的偏心率受到周期性驱动，并通过系统相图检查向列序和同步变形之间的相互作用。我们通过粗粒度程序得出了流体动力学描述，并表明它定性地捕获了微观动力学的主要集体状态。总的来说，我们的模型提供了关于主动各向异性变形如何产生自组织成各种动态模式的波的关键见解。

title: Topological fragility and bilinear magnetoelectric resistance in gapless edge states
abstract: In time-reversal symmetric systems such as topological and higher-order topological insulators, 1D spin-momentum locked edge and hinge states are theoretically ``perfectly conducting'', being immune to backscattering by non-magnetic disorder. Here, we reveal a fundamental ``topological fragility'': these states exhibit a bilinear magnetoelectric resistance significantly larger than in 2D systems. This effect requires two ingredients: (i) spin-momentum locking, which maximizes time-reversal symmetry breaking in the non-linear regime, and (ii) random spin-orbit interaction -- the same mechanism behind Elliott - Yafet spin relaxation in heavy elements. Together, these generate a robust backscattering channel when a modest external magnetic field is applied. Our theory requires no gap opening or complex many-body effects, offering a simple and general mechanism that quantitatively explains recent observations in Bismuth hinge states.
summary: 在拓扑和高阶拓扑绝缘体等时间反转对称系统中，一维自旋动量锁定边缘和铰链状态理论上是“完美传导”的，不受非磁性紊乱引起的反向散射的影响。在这里，我们揭示了一个基本的“拓扑脆弱性”：这些状态表现出明显大于二维系统的双线性磁电阻。这种效应需要两个成分：（i）自旋动量锁定，它可以最大限度地提高非线性状态下的时间反转对称性破缺，以及（ii）随机自旋轨道相互作用——与重元素中艾略特-亚菲特自旋弛豫背后的机制相同。当施加适度的外部磁场时，它们共同产生强大的反向散射通道。我们的理论不需要间隙打开或复杂的多体效应，提供了一种简单而通用的机制，可以定量解释最近在铋铰链态中的观察结果。

title: Equivalent-neighbor $k$-core percolation in two dimensions
abstract: We perform large-scale numerical simulations to investigate the critical behavior of $k$-core percolation in two dimensions with an extended interaction range $r$. By systematically varying both the core index $k$ and the interaction range $r$, we construct a comprehensive phase diagram in the $(k,r)$ plane. In contrast to $k$-core percolation in infinite dimensions, no hybrid transition is observed in two dimensions: the phase diagram contains only a continuous transition regime and a strictly first-order regime, separated by a tricritical or critical-end point $(k_s,r_s)$. For $k<k_s$ and $r<r_s$, the transition is continuous and belongs to the universality class of standard two-dimensional (2D) percolation. For $k>k_s$ and finite $r>r_s$, the transition is discontinuous, with no hybrid features or critical singularities. In this first-order regime, the pseudocritical point approaches the critical point as $1/\ln L$, where $L$ is the linear system size, distinct from the $L^{-d}$ scaling typical of conventional thermodynamic first-order transitions in $d$ dimensions. This logarithmic finite-size drift is consistent with a nucleation-driven mechanism, in which rare voids trigger the collapse of the finite-range $k$-core. These results demonstrate that geometric constraints can fundamentally alter the nature of $k$-core percolation found in finite dimensions.
summary:
我们进行大规模数值模拟，以研究具有扩展相互作用范围 $r$ 的二维 $k$ 核心渗流的关键行为。通过系统地改变核心指数 $k$ 和相互作用范围 $r$，我们在 $(k,r)$ 平面上构建了一个综合相图。与无限维度中的 $k$ 核心渗透相反，在二维中没有观察到混合转变：相图仅包含连续转变区域和严格的一阶区域，由三临界或临界终点 $(k_s,r_s)$ 分隔。对于 $k<k_s$ 和 $r<r_s$，过渡是连续的，属于标准二维 (2D) 渗流的通用类。对于 $k>k_s$ 和有限的 $r>r_s$，过渡是不连续的，没有混合特征或关键奇点。在此一阶状态中，伪临界点接近临界点为 $1/\ln L$，其中 $L$ 是线性系统尺寸，与 $d$ 维度中传统热力学一阶跃迁典型的 $L^{-d}$ 缩放不同。

这种对数有限尺寸漂移与成核驱动机制一致，其中稀有空隙触发有限范围 $k$ 核心的崩溃。这些结果表明，几何约束可以从根本上改变有限维度中 $k$ 核心渗透的性质。

title: Cluster moves with an entropic reservoir accelerate low-temperature simulations of three-dimensional spin glasses
abstract: We present an algorithm for the simulation of three-dimensional spin glasses deep in the low-temperature phase: Parallel Tempering enhanced with Houdayer moves and with an entropic reservoir (PTHR). Although differences with the standard Houdayer algorithm are small, PTHR allows us to equilibrate a large number of samples of $L=16$ lattices with Gaussian couplings for temperatures $T\geq 0.2$. We show that the computational complexity displays better size scaling than standard Parallel Tempering. For finite sizes, our method outperforms other cluster algorithms by a speedup factor of around 64. In close analogy with standard Parallel Tempering, PTHR's computational complexity strongly relates to temperature chaos.
summary: 我们提出了一种在低温相深处模拟三维自旋玻璃的算法：通过 Houdayer 移动和熵库 (PTHR) 增强平行回火。尽管与标准 Houdayer 算法的差异很小，但 PTHR 允许我们在温度 $T\geq 0.2$ 下使用高斯耦合来平衡大量 $L=16$ 晶格样本。我们表明，计算复杂性显示出比标准平行回火更好的尺寸缩放。对于有限尺寸，我们的方法优于其他集群算法，加速系数约为 64。与标准并行回火非常相似，PTHR 的计算复杂性与温度混沌密切相关。

title: Scaling features for the stress fluctuations in the OFC model
abstract: We consider the Olami-Feder-Christensen (OFC) model on a square two-dimensional lattice with open boundary conditions. The model exhibits self-organized criticality and explains the Gutenberg-Richter law observed for earthquakes. A parameter $\alpha$ controls the level of local dissipation: $\alpha < 0.25$ corresponds to locally dissipative and $\alpha = 0.25$ marks locally conservative dynamics. The avalanche size distribution follows a decaying power-law, with a non-universal critical exponent. Here, we examine the probability distribution of the difference between avalanche size and area. This quantity remains unexplored despite being of significant interest in earthquakes. We find a power-law with a scaling exponent close to one in the conservative OFC model. The scaling feature vanishes even for the physically relevant case $\alpha = 0.21$. To examine the robustness of such features, we also examine the same quantity in the BTW and Manna sandpile models on a square lattice. We find that the power-law behavior survives for these systems due to locally conservative dynamics. We further examine the local and total stress fluctuations in the OFC model for both locally conservative and dissipative dynamics. The finite-size scaling analysis of the power spectra for the stress fluctuations reveals qualitatively the same but quantitatively significantly different behavior. The dynamic exponent describing the divergence of the correlation time with system size changes from nearly ballistic in the conservative to diffusive behavior in the locally dissipative dynamics with $\alpha = 0.21$. The local stress also exhibits a signature of nearly canonical $1/f$ noise in the intermediate regime, and $1/f^2$-type scaling dominates the high-frequency regime.
summary:
我们考虑具有开放边界条件的方形二维晶格上的 Olami-Fe​​der-Christensen (OFC) 模型。该模型表现出自组织临界性，并解释了针对地震观察到的古腾堡-里希特定律。参数 $\alpha$ 控制局部耗散水平：$\alpha < 0.25$ 对应于局部耗散，$\alpha = 0.25$ 标记局部保守动态。雪崩大小分布遵循衰减幂律，具有非通用临界指数。在这里，我们检查雪崩大小和面积之间差异的概率分布。尽管地震引起了人们极大的兴趣，但这一数量仍未得到勘探。我们在保守的 OFC 模型中发现了幂律，其标度指数接近 1。即使对于物理相关的情况 $\alpha = 0.21$，缩放功能也会消失。为了检查这些特征的稳健性，我们还在方格上检查 BTW 和 Manna 沙堆模型中的相同数量。我们发现，由于局部保守的动力学，幂律行为在这些系统中仍然存在。

我们进一步检查 OFC 模型中局部保守和耗散动力学的局部和总应力波动。应力波动功率谱的有限尺寸缩放分析揭示了定性上相同但定量上显着不同的行为。描述相关时间与系统规模的差异的动态指数从保守的近弹道行为变为局部耗散动力学中的扩散行为，$\alpha = 0.21$。局部应力还在中间区域表现出近乎规范的 $1/f$ 噪声的特征，而 $1/f^2$ 型缩放在高频区域占主导地位。

title: Mutual Friction in Dissipative Gross-Pitaevskii Thermal Counterflow Turbulence
abstract: We report numerical simulations of the dissipative Gross-Pitaevskii equation for a bulk region of thermal-counterflow turbulence. Quasistationary states are obtained over a range of forcing, damping, and healing-length parameters. The mutual-friction acceleration exhibits cubic scaling with the mean relative velocity between the superfluid and normal-fluid components, and the coefficient of this scaling is linked to the phenomenological damping parameter. The intervortex spacing follows the expected dimensional scaling in the weak-forcing regime. Comparison with a straight-vortex-line model suggests that the vortex-line orientations are nearly isotropic.
summary: 我们报告了大面积热逆流湍流区域的耗散 Gross-Pitaevskii 方程的数值模拟。准稳态是通过一系列的力、阻尼和愈合长度参数获得的。相互摩擦加速度与超流体和正常流体分量之间的平均相对速度呈立方比例，并且该比例的系数与唯象阻尼参数相关。涡旋间距遵循弱强迫状态下的预期尺寸缩放。与直线涡线模型的比较表明，涡线方向几乎是各向同性的。

title: Exact Single-Scale Outer Solution of the Abrikosov Vortex in the Extreme Type-II Limit
abstract: We determine the exact outer structure of the Abrikosov vortex in the extreme type-II limit, which occurs when the Ginzburg-Landau parameter $\kappa$ diverges. In this limit, Ginzburg-Landau theory simplifies, outside a shrinking core, to a closed nonlinear theory for the superfluid velocity subject to an algebraic density constraint. The resulting solution is asymptotically exact everywhere outside the vanishing vortex core, demonstrating that both magnetic field and superconducting density vary on the length scale of the London penetration depth. This establishes that the conventional two-length-scale picture of the vortex does not hold in the $\kappa\gg 1$ limit.
summary: 我们确定了阿布里科索夫涡旋在 II 型极端极限下的确切外部结构，该极限在 Ginzburg-Landau 参数 $\kappa$ 发散时发生。在此限制下，Ginzburg-Landau 理论在收缩核心之外简化为受代数密度约束的超流体速度的封闭非线性理论。由此产生的解在消失涡核之外的任何地方都是渐近精确的，这表明磁场和超导密度在伦敦穿透深度的长度尺度上变化。这表明传统的涡旋两长度尺度图像不满足 $\kappa\gg 1$ 限制。

title: Generalized field mixing for endpoint criticality with marginal flow: resolving the four-state Potts endpoint in the square-lattice $J_1$--$J_2$ Ising model
abstract: Identifying the asymptotic criticality of a critical endpoint is challenging, as pseudo-first-order signatures persist over accessible system sizes and mask its underlying critical nature. This ambiguity is amplified at endpoints controlled by a marginally irrelevant scaling field, where logarithmic flow delays the onset of asymptotic scaling. Here we develop a generalized field-mixing framework for endpoint criticality governed by one relevant scaling field together with a marginally irrelevant one, a setting that lies outside the conventional two-relevant-field formulation. By constructing a finite-size pseudocritical manifold, the framework removes the normal relevant detuning and exposes the residual marginal drift, enabling controlled histogram- and Binder-based finite-size analyses. We apply this approach to the frustrated square-lattice $J_1$--$J_2$ Ising model, where the location and even the nature of the stripe-ordering endpoint have remained controversial for decades. The endpoint is isolated directly as a distinct singular point, rather than inferred from where the phase boundary appears most Potts-like, and its asymptotic criticality is shown to follow four-state Potts universality with logarithmic corrections. This identification is independently supported by direct comparison with the Potts point of the Ashkin--Teller model and by consistent Binder scaling in both the magnetic and nematic sectors. Our results resolve a longstanding numerical ambiguity in a paradigmatic frustrated Ising system and establish a general framework for extracting asymptotic endpoint criticality in the presence of marginal flow.
summary:
识别关键端点的渐近临界性具有挑战性，因为伪一阶签名在可访问的系统大小上持续存在并掩盖了其潜在的关键性质。这种模糊性在由稍微不相关的标度场控制的端点处被放大，其中对数流延迟了渐近标度的开始。在这里，我们开发了一种通用的场混合框架，用于端点关键性，该框架由一个相关的缩放字段和一个稍微不相关的缩放字段一起控制，这是一种位于传统的两个相关字段公式之外的设置。通过构建有限尺寸的伪临界流形，该框架消除了正常的相关失谐并暴露了残余边缘漂移，从而实现了受控直方图和基于 Binder 的有限尺寸分析。我们将这种方法应用于受挫方格 $J_1$-$J_2$ Ising 模型，其中条带排序端点的位置甚至性质几十年来一直存在争议。

端点被直接隔离为一个独特的奇点，而不是从相边界看起来最像 Potts 的地方推断出来，并且其渐近临界性显示出遵循对数校正的四态 Potts 普适性。通过与 Ashkin-Teller 模型的 Potts 点的直接比较以及磁性和向列扇区中一致的 Binder 缩放，独立地支持了这种识别。我们的结果解决了范式受挫伊辛系统中长期存在的数值模糊性，并建立了一个在存在边际流的情况下提取渐近端点临界性的通用框架。

title: Excess entropy scaling of the transverse sound speed in simple fluids
abstract: A calculation of the transverse sound velocity as a function of excess entropy is presented for several simple fluids, including the Lennard-Jones, Yukawa, one-component plasma, inverse-power law (soft sphere) and hard sphere models. A quasi-universal character of this dependence is established, extending Rosenfeld's excess-entropy scaling of transport coefficients to the transverse sound velocity. The results are discussed in terms of the soft- to hard-sphere crossover and the Frenkel crossover between gas-like and liquid-like dynamics.
summary: 提出了几种简单流体的横向声速作为过剩熵函数的计算，包括 Lennard-Jones、Yukawa、单组分等离子体、逆幂律（软球）和硬球模型。建立了这种依赖性的准普遍特征，将罗森菲尔德的输运系数的超熵标度扩展到横向声速。结果根据软球到硬球交叉以及类气体和类液体动力学之间的弗伦克尔交叉进行了讨论。

title: Light-Induced Transient Polarization Reversal in Rhombohedrally Stacked Bilayer Transition-Metal Dichalcogenides via an Electronic Mechanism
abstract: Light-induced sliding ferroelectricity in two-dimensional van der Waals materials enables polarization control via relative layer motion. However, polarization switching occurs on the time scale of shear modes (tens of ps) and requires very large fluences, potentially damaging the samples. Here, using constrained density functional theory and many-body real-time simulations, we demonstrate an ultrafast electronic reversal of the total out-of-plane polarization sign in the photoexcited state, without requiring interlayer sliding, in rhombohedrally stacked transition-metal dichalcogenide bilayers. The polarization changes sign relative to its initial ground-state value at moderate fluences and within 200 fs, about 50 times faster than the typical shear-mode period. The ultrafast switching is driven by a rearrangement of localized dipoles around the tungsten sites. We establish a novel general mechanism for electronic control of low-dimensional ferroelectrics common to all polar multilayers having type II band alignment. Our work has direct implications for ultrahigh-speed volatile optical memory operating on sub-ps time scales.
summary: 二维范德华材料中的光致滑动铁电性可以通过相对层运动来控制偏振。然而，偏振切换发生在剪切模式的时间尺度（数十皮秒）上，并且需要非常大的能量密度，可能会损坏样品。在这里，利用约束密度泛函理论和多体实时模拟，我们证明了在菱面体堆叠的过渡金属二硫属化物双层中，光激发态下总面外偏振符号的超快电子反转，而不需要层间滑动。在中等注量下，极化在 200 fs 内相对于其初始基态值改变符号，比典型剪切模式周期快约 50 倍。超快开关是由钨位点周围局部偶极子的重新排列驱动的。我们建立了一种新颖的通用机制，用于对具有 II 型能带排列的所有极性多层共有的低维铁电体进行电子控制。我们的工作对亚皮秒时间尺度上运行的超高速易失性光学存储器具有直接影响。

title: Boltzmann Distribution from Invariance of Coarse-Graining-Scale and Energy-Shift
abstract: We present a concise derivation of the Boltzmann form for single-particle energy distributions in classical many-body Hamiltonian systems. The derivation relies on two physical facts: coarse-graining-scale invariance of the empirical distribution and invariance under a uniform shift of the energy zero. These conditions uniquely yield the Boltzmann factor, whose parameter is fixed by the mean energy per particle. For separable Hamiltonians, the equilibrium weight factorizes into kinetic and configurational contributions sharing the same parameter, identified from the kinetic part as the inverse kinetic temperature. The principle extends to any physical quantity with a stationary distribution and translational invariance. It is illustrated in a one-dimensional diatomic hard-core gas and a nonlinear lattice chain, where it predicts velocity, energy, spacing, collision-time, and pressure-dependent displacement distributions in agreement with simulations. The lattice model further shows how harmonic elasticity, anharmonic corrections, internal pressure, and thermal expansion emerge from the same exponential equilibrium weights. Finally, the relationships among different ensembles are briefly discussed.
summary:
我们提出了经典多体哈密顿系统中单粒子能量分布的玻尔兹曼形式的简明推导。该推导依赖于两个物理事实：经验分布的粗粒度不变性和能量零均匀移动下的不变性。这些条件唯一地产生玻尔兹曼因子，其参数由每个粒子的平均能量固定。对于可分离的哈密顿量，平衡权重分解为共享相同参数的动力学和构型贡献，从动力学部分识别为逆动力学温度。该原理扩展到任何具有平稳分布和平移不变性的物理量。它在一维双原子硬核气体和非线性晶格链中进行了说明，其中它预测了与模拟一致的速度、能量、间距、碰撞时间和压力相关的位移分布。晶格模型进一步显示了调和弹性、非调和校正、内部压力和热膨胀如何从相同的指数平衡权重中产生。

最后，简要讨论了不同集成之间的关系。

title: Beyond Gaussian Statistics in Polymer Melts: Statistical Masking of Persistent Local Constraints
abstract: Short polymer chains exhibit clear deviations from Gaussian end-to-end distance statistics, yet the molecular mechanism by which Gaussian behavior is recovered in long chains remains unestablished. Atomistic molecular dynamics simulations of polyethylene melts reveal that conformational heterogeneity persists at the Kuhn scale across all chain lengths, consisting of a mosaic of slow-relaxing, extended aligned chain segments (ACS) and coiled segments -- random conformational sequences (RCS) and chain ends (CE). We show that the end-to-end distance distributions for both unentangled and entangled chains are accurately described by a $q$-Gaussian function, with the entropic index $q$ increasing systematically from $0.67$ (C50) to $0.99$ (C500). This evolution tracks the emergence and accumulation of RCS segments, which are absent in short chains, establishing $q$ as a quantitative ``heterogeneity index''. The $q < 1$ values are a signature of non-extensive statistics, with the ratio of Tsallis to Boltzmann-Gibbs entropy ($S_q/S_1$), computed directly from simulation data without fitting, decreasing from $1.80$ (C50) to $1.03$ (C500). Crucially, we demonstrate that Gaussian recovery does not result from the erasure of Kuhn-scale heterogeneities, as ACS domains persist in all chain lengths above the critical mass ($\approx 35\%$). Instead, the transition to Gaussian statistics is a statistical masking effect, where the accumulation of independent RCS segments progressively obscures the non-Gaussian signatures of the persistent ACS domains.
summary:
短聚合物链表现出与高斯端到端距离统计的明显偏差，但在长链中恢复高斯行为的分子机制仍未确定。聚乙烯熔体的原子分子动力学模拟表明，构象异质性在所有链长上都以库恩尺度持续存在，由缓慢松弛、延伸对齐链段 (ACS) 和卷曲链段——随机构象序列 (RCS) 和链末端 (CE) 组成的镶嵌体组成。我们表明，非纠缠链和纠缠链的端到端距离分布均由 $q$-高斯函数准确描述，熵指数 $q$ 从 $0.67$ (C50) 系统地增加到 $0.99$ (C500)。这种演变追踪了短链中不存在的 RCS 片段的出现和积累，将 $q$ 建立为定量的“异质性指数”。 $q < 1$ 值是非广泛统计的标志，Tsallis 与 Boltzmann-Gibbs 熵的比率 ($S_q/S_1$) 直接根据模拟数据计算而无需拟合，从 $1.80$ (C50) 下降到 $1.03$ (C500)。

至关重要的是，我们证明高斯恢复并不是消除库恩尺度异质性的结果，因为 ACS 域在高于临界质量（$\约 35\%$）的所有链长度中持续存在。相反，向高斯统计的过渡是一种统计屏蔽效应，其中独立 RCS 片段的积累逐渐掩盖了持久 ACS 域的非高斯特征。

title: Topology of pulsating active matter: Defect asymmetry controls emergent motility
abstract: In pulsating active matter, topological defects are motile despite the absence of any macroscopic flows and microscopic self-propulsion. We reveal that this motility arises from a ratchet effect: the mechanochemical coupling between local oscillations and repulsive interactions breaks both spatial and time-reversal symmetries, thus leading asymmetric rotating defects to drift under fluctuations. This mechanism regulates a crossover between spiral waves connecting slow defects and fiber-like waves connecting fast defects, in analogy with the onset of heart rhythm disorder in cardiac tissues. We rationalize this crossover in terms of a fluctuating hydrodynamics that captures how motile defects spontaneously nucleate and move within an ordered background.
summary: 在脉动活性物质中，尽管不存在任何宏观流动和微观自推进，但拓扑缺陷仍然是运动的。我们揭示了这种运动性源于棘轮效应：局部振荡和排斥相互作用之间的机械化学耦合打破了空间和时间反转对称性，从而导致不对称旋转缺陷在波动下漂移。这种机制调节连接慢缺陷的螺旋波和连接快缺陷的纤维状波之间的交叉，类似于心脏组织中心律紊乱的发生。我们根据波动流体动力学合理化这种交叉，捕捉运动缺陷如何在有序背景下自发成核和移动。

title: Effect of slow bonds on current fluctuations in the symmetric simple exclusion process
abstract: The symmetric simple exclusion process (SSEP) is a paradigmatic model of classical non-equilibrium dynamics. Exact results for large deviations of particle current in the SSEP have been obtained in various settings using integrability-based methods. In this Article, we discuss how these results are modified in the presence of localized slow bonds. We consider three conventional geometries: (a) a finite one-dimensional lattice weakly coupled to unequal reservoirs at its boundaries, (b) a semi-infinite one-dimensional lattice weakly coupled to a boundary reservoir, and (c) an infinite one-dimensional lattice with localized slow bonds near the origin. For each case, we present exact expressions for the large deviation function of current and validate them through rare-event simulations based on the cloning algorithm. In connection with our results, we present an elementary derivation of the exact large deviation function for the current in the semi-infinite SSEP, complementing recent results obtained through more elaborate techniques.
summary: 对称简单排除过程（SSEP）是经典非平衡动力学的范例模型。使用基于可积性的方法，在各种设置下获得了 SSEP 中粒子电流大偏差的精确结果。在本文中，我们讨论了在存在局部慢速债券的情况下如何修改这些结果。我们考虑三种常规几何结构：（a）与边界处的不等储层弱耦合的有限一维晶格，（b）与边界储层弱耦合的半无限一维晶格，以及（c）原点附近具有局域慢键的无限一维晶格。对于每种情况，我们都给出了电流大偏差函数的精确表达式，并通过基于克隆算法的罕见事件模拟来验证它们。结合我们的结果，我们提出了半无限 SSEP 中电流的精确大偏差函数的基本推导，补充了通过更复杂的技术获得的最新结果。

title: Response of a dipolar BEC to Laguerre-Gaussian beam driven STIRAP
abstract: Coherent light-matter coupling via STIRAP can offer a versatile route to nucleate quantized vortices in Bose-Einstein condensates, yet its efficacy in dipolar condensates remains an open question. Can the orbital angular momentum of a Laguerre-Gaussian beam be coherently transferred to a dipolar BEC via STIRAP? We investigate this for a quasi-two-dimensional trapped dipolar condensate using co-propagating Gaussian and Laguerre-Gaussian laser beams. The interplay between long-range dipole-dipole interactions and short-range contact interactions enables access to three interaction-driven phases: superfluid, droplet, and supersolid. We find that the amount of angular momentum transferred from the optical field to the dipolar condensate, along with the nucleation and persistence of vortices, depends strongly on the underlying phases of the dipolar BEC. In the superfluid, STIRAP achieves near-complete population transfer and nucleates a stable, long-lived quantized vortex. In the droplet phase, although the vortex remains pinned within the density profile, the angular momentum is partially retained and oscillatory, accompanied by droplet fragmentation and recombination. In the supersolid phase, when the external magnetic field is oriented perpendicular to the LG beam's propagation direction, the emergence of a modulated density distribution along with a slight reduction in inter-droplet coherence leads to vortex delocalization and eventually expels it along the field direction, yielding a vanishing average angular momentum. However, reorienting the magnetic polarization along the beam propagation direction restores efficient angular momentum transfer and stabilizes the vortex within the supersolid phase. Overall, our results demonstrate a versatile route to engineer vortex states and probe collective excitations in dipolar Bose gases via coherent light-matter coupling.
summary:
通过 STIRAP 的相干光-物质耦合可以提供一种在玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚中使量子化涡旋成核的通用途径，但其在偶极凝聚中的功效仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。拉盖尔高斯光束的轨道角动量能否通过 STIRAP 相干地转移到偶极 BEC？我们使用共同传播高斯和拉盖尔高斯激光束研究准二维俘获偶极凝聚体。长程偶极-偶极相互作用和短程接触相互作用之间的相互作用使得能够进入三个相互作用驱动的相：超流体、液滴和超固体。我们发现，从光场转移到偶极凝聚体的角动量，以及涡旋的成核和持续性，在很大程度上取决于偶极 BEC 的基础相。在超流体中，STIRAP 实现了近乎完全的群体转移，并形成了稳定、长寿命的量子化涡旋。在液滴相中，尽管涡流仍然固定在密度分布内，但角动量部分保留并振荡，伴随着液滴破碎和重组。

在超固相中，当外部磁场垂直于 LG 光束的传播方向时，调制密度分布的出现以及液滴间相干性的轻微降低导致涡旋离域，并最终沿场方向将其排出，产生平均角动量消失。然而，沿着光束传播方向重新定向磁极化可以恢复有效的角动量传递并稳定超固相内的涡流。总的来说，我们的结果展示了一种通过相干光-物质耦合来设计涡旋态和探测偶极玻色气体中集体激发的通用途径。

title: Finite scalar field theory with SU(1,1) spacetime symmetry from near-BPS limits of $\mathcal{N}=4$ SYM
abstract: In this work, we consider an interacting and matrix-valued scalar quantum field theory that emerges from a near-BPS decoupling limit of $\mathcal{N}=4$ super Yang-Mills. The theory is non-Lorentzian with SU(1,1) spacetime symmetry and admits a (semi-)local action formulation. The interaction can be viewed as arising from a non-abelian gauge field without propagating degrees of freedom. The proposed field theory action has previously been considered as classically equivalent to SU(1,1) Spin Matrix theory. In this work, we examine this equivalence at the quantum level. We show that the classical action is off-shell invariant under the SU(1,1) symmetry group. We then analyze the renormalization properties, showing the theory is finite at all orders in perturbation theory. This provides a rare example of a non-supersymmetric and non-Lorentzian quantum field theory where a non-renormalization theorem holds.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们考虑了一种相互作用的矩阵值标量量子场论，它产生于 $\mathcal{N}=4$ super Yang-Mills 的近 BPS 解耦极限。该理论是具有 SU(1,1) 时空对称性的非洛伦兹理论，并承认（半）局域作用公式。这种相互作用可以被看作是由非阿贝尔规范场产生的，没有传播自由度。所提出的场论作用先前被认为在经典上等同于 SU(1,1) 自旋矩阵理论。在这项工作中，我们在量子水平上研究了这种等价性。我们证明经典作用在 SU(1,1) 对称群下是离壳不变的。然后我们分析重整化性质，表明该理论在微扰理论中的所有阶上都是有限的。这提供了非重整化定理成立的非超对称和非洛伦兹量子场论的罕见例子。

title: Bremsstrahlung function in $\mathcal{N}=2$ SCFTs far beyond the supergravity limit
abstract: We study the Bremsstrahlung function in two four-dimensional $\mathcal{N}=2$ superconformal gauge theories: the E-theory, with hypermultiplets in the symmetric and antisymmetric representations, and the D-theory, with antisymmetric and fundamental matter. Using matrix model techniques, we derive exact results at arbitrary coupling for the first few orders in the large-$N$ expansion. At leading order, both theories are shown to be planar equivalent to $\mathcal{N}=4$ Super Yang-Mills, while beyond the planar limit their behavior differs significantly. For the E-theory, we prove that the subleading correction is exactly given by a derivative of the free energy with respect to the coupling. This relation enables us to determine the complete strong-coupling expansion for the Bremsstrahlung function, including non-perturbative contributions, by exploiting known results for the free energy. For the D-theory, the exact expressions have a more intricate structure. We perform a detailed analysis of the strong-coupling regime of the subleading large-$N$ corrections, showing that, in this case, there are expansions in inverse powers of the coupling which truncate after finitely many terms. We further analyze the non-perturbative effects at strong coupling and derive closed-form expressions also for these contributions. These results provide precise predictions for the holographic duals of both theories beyond the supergravity approximation, probing higher orders in the large-$N$ expansion and the full subleading corrections at strong coupling.
summary:
我们研究了两个四维 $\mathcal{N}=2$ 超共形规范理论中的轫致辐射函数：E 理论（具有对称和反对称表示中的超多重态）和 D 理论（具有反对称和基本物质）。使用矩阵模型技术，我们在大$N$展开中的前几个阶的任意耦合下得出精确结果。在领先顺序下，两种理论都被证明是平面等效于 $\mathcal{N}=4$ Super Yang-Mills，而超出平面极限时，它们的行为有显着差异。对于E理论，我们证明了次导修正恰好是由自由能相对于耦合的导数给出的。这种关系使我们能够通过利用已知的自由能结果来确定轫致辐射函数的完整强耦合展开式，包括非微扰贡献。对于D理论，精确表达式具有更复杂的结构。我们对次领先大$N$修正的强耦合机制进行了详细分析，表明在这种情况下，耦合的逆幂存在扩展，在有限多项之后会被截断。

我们进一步分析强耦合下的非微扰效应，并推导出这些贡献的封闭式表达式。这些结果为两种理论的全息对偶提供了超出超重力近似的精确预测，探索了大$N$展开中的更高阶以及强耦合下的完全次引导校正。

title: A Matrix Model for Higher-Genus Fuss--Catalan Numbers
abstract: The genus--g Fuss--Catalan (FC) number counts the number of ways to obtain a genus-g surface by identifying the edges of a pn--gon via p-valent hyperedges. For p=2 these are the genus--g Catalan numbers which are generated as the trace correlations in the Gaussian matrix model (GUE). Here we construct a simple two-matrix model which generates the higher-genus Fuss--Catalan numbers for any p as the coefficients of its 1/N-expansion. We obtain exact sum rules and an explicit formula for the higher-genus Fuss--Catalan numbers which generalises the Harer--Zagier formula to p>2. We discuss the relation of the higher-genus FC numbers to the intersection numbers and the Euler characteristic of the moduli space of spin-p curves.
summary: genus--g Fuss--Catalan (FC) 数计算通过 p 价超边识别 pn--gon 的边来获得 genus-g 曲面的方法数量。对于 p=2，这些是 genus--g 加泰罗尼亚数，它们是作为高斯矩阵模型 (GUE) 中的迹相关性生成的。在这里，我们构建了一个简单的二矩阵模型，该模型生成任何 p 的高属 Fuss-Catalan 数作为其 1/N 展开式的系数。我们获得了高属 Fuss-Catalan 数的精确求和规则和显式公式，该公式将 Harer-Zagier 公式推广到 p>2。我们讨论了高格数FC数与交数的关系以及自旋p曲线模空间的欧拉特性。

title: Hawking radiation from a semi-classical Schwarzschild black hole
abstract: This study investigates the evaporation process of a Schwarzschild black hole, incorporating quantum corrections arising from conformal anomaly and vacuum polarization. We demonstrate that these corrections significantly alter the Hawking radiation and the black hole's thermodynamic behavior. Specifically, the black hole exhibits a maximum temperature, after which the radiation begins to decrease, eventually leading to the cessation of Hawking radiation. The final state of the black hole at the end of the evaporation process is found to be an extremal remnant with a vanishing Hawking temperature. Furthermore, we show that the black hole entropy is modified, acquiring a logarithmic correction. Hawking radiation is also examined through the lens of the tunneling method, providing a consistent picture of these quantum effects.
summary: 这项研究研究了史瓦西黑洞的蒸发过程，结合了共形异常和真空极化产生的量子校正。我们证明这些修正显着改变了霍金辐射和黑洞的热力学行为。具体来说，黑洞表现出最高温度，之后辐射开始减少，最终导致霍金辐射停止。人们发现，蒸发过程结束时黑洞的最终状态是霍金温度消失的极值残余。此外，我们表明黑洞熵被修改，获得对数校正。霍金辐射也通过隧道方法的透镜进行检查，提供了这些量子效应的一致图像。

title: Graviton scattering in the null surface formulation. Part III: Fourth-order Bondi shear and the tree-level amplitude
abstract: We complete a trilogy on quantum graviton scattering in the null surface formulation (NSF) of general relativity by computing the fourth-order Bondi shear $\sigma^+_4$ and establishing three results of general scope. The perturbative $S$-matrix of the NSF is UV-finite at every loop order. This follows from the kernel scaling $K^{(n)}\sim\omega_{\mathrm{ext}}/q^{n-2}$, which we derive by induction on the recursive null-cone scattering equation; the $L$-loop integrand then scales as $dq/q^{4L}$, which is convergent for all $L\geq 1$ without regularization. We show that a simple loop-counting formula, $L=(n_1+n_2-6)/2$, classifies the topologically distinct contributions to $2\to 2$ graviton scattering by the perturbative orders $n_1$, $n_2$ of the out-operators. Tree level ($L=0$) is exhausted by $\mathcal{M}^{(22)}$, $\mathcal{M}^{(33)}$, and $\mathcal{M}^{(24)}$, which together reproduce the Weinberg--DeWitt amplitude $\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{tree}}=-\kappa^2s^3/(4tu)$. The complete 1-loop amplitude requires, in addition to $\sigma^+_4$, the fields $\sigma^+_5$ and $\sigma^+_6$. At order $n\geq 4$ the standard Jordan--Pauli argument, which equates the advanced and retarded null-cone contributions, must be extended. The advanced cone receives additional contributions from $\delta\sigma^+_j$ ($j<n$), the nontrivial scattering corrections determined at previous orders. We formulate this as a generalized Jordan--Pauli relation that provides a systematic, order-by-order procedure for computing $\sigma^+_n$ from the free incoming datum $\sigma^-$. The computation of $\sigma^+_4$ uses three retarded-cone pairs, the conformal factor $\delta\Omega^-_4$, and -- for the first time -- advanced-cone corrections from pairs $(1,3)$ and $(2,2)$ built from the known $\sigma^+_2$ and $\sigma^+_3$
summary:
通过计算四阶邦迪剪切 $\sigma^+_4$ 并建立三个广义范围的结果，我们完成了广义相对论零面公式 (NSF) 中量子引力子散射的三部曲。 NSF 的扰动 $S$ 矩阵在每个循环阶数上都是 UV 有限的。这是从核缩放 $K^{(n)}\sim\omega_{\mathrm{ext}}/q^{n-2}$ 得出的，我们通过递归零锥散射方程的归纳推导出来；然后，$L$ 循环被积函数缩放为 $dq/q^{4L}$，在没有正则化的情况下，它对于所有 $L\geq 1$ 都是收敛的。我们展示了一个简单的循环计数公式 $L=(n_1+n_2-6)/2$，通过外算子的扰动阶 $n_1$、$n_2$ 对 $2\to 2$ 引力子散射的拓扑不同贡献进行分类。树层 ($L=0$) 由 $\mathcal{M}^{(22)}$、$\mathcal{M}^{(33)}$ 和 $\mathcal{M}^{(24)}$ 耗尽，它们一起再现 Weinberg--DeWitt 幅度 $\mathcal{M}_{\mathrm{tree}}=-\kappa^2s^3/(4tu)$。完整的 1 环幅度除了 $\sigma^+_4$ 之外，还需要字段 $\sigma^+_5$ 和 $\sigma^+_6$。

在 $n\geq 4$ 阶上，必须扩展标准的 Jordan-Pauli 论证，该论证等同于超前和滞后的零锥贡献。高级锥体接收来自 $\delta\sigma^+_j$ ($j<n$) 的额外贡献，这是在先前订单中确定的重要散射校正。我们将其表述为广义的 Jordan-Pauli 关系，它提供了一个系统的、按顺序的过程，用于根据自由输入数据 $\sigma^-$ 计算 $\sigma^+_n$。 $\sigma^+_4$ 的计算使用三个延迟锥体对、共形因子 $\delta\Omega^-_4$，以及首次使用从已知 $\sigma^+_2$ 和 $\sigma^+_3$ 构建的对 $(1,3)$ 和 $(2,2)$ 的高级锥体校正

title: Discrete Laplacian Structure and Kernel Reduction of the Gap Equation in $d=4k+3$ Gross--Neveu Model at Imaginary Chemical Potential
abstract: We observe a remarkable mathematical structure in the gap equations of the large-$N$ Gross--Neveu model at imaginary chemical potential in odd spacetime dimensions $d = 4k+3$. We show they can be written as the sum of two parts: one defined by higher-order discrete Laplacian patterns and a cut-off dependent part given by truncated asymptotic expansion of a hypergeometric function. We argue that this picture corresponds to a deeper relationship between thermal field theories in these odd $d$ and exactly-solvable one-dimensional quantum problems. We find that the thermal mass at specific imaginary chemical potential values is fixed where internal energy balances entropic states of thermal modes which is physically equivalent with OPE inversion formula techniques where thermal mass values arise from transcendental sets of equations.
summary: 我们在奇数时空维度 $d = 4k+3$ 的虚化学势下的大 $N$ Gross-Neveu 模型的间隙方程中观察到了显着的数学结构。我们证明它们可以写成两部分的和：一部分由高阶离散拉普拉斯模式定义，另一部分由超几何函数的截断渐近展开给出。我们认为，这张图对应了这些奇怪的 $d$ 中的热场理论与精确可解的一维量子问题之间的更深层次关系。我们发现，特定虚化学势值下的热质量是固定的，其中内部能量平衡热模式的熵态，这与 OPE 反演公式技术在物理上等效，其中热质量值来自超越方程组。

title: Beyond Algebraic Solutions to Stringy Spacetime
abstract: Active feedback between geometry and physics is woven throughout the study of Nature at its fundamental level, and is of key importance in string theory. Methods of complex algebraic geometry in particular have brought about an unrivaled abundance of solutions, counted well into hundreds of orders of magnitude, reciprocated by the discovery of the wholly unexpected mirror symmetry. However, recent developments demonstrate that there are rich additional possibilities, made possible by certain generalizations that, at first glance, appear to be non-algebraic. Nevertheless, they are remarkably well-aligned within an overall mirror-symmetric framework, are amenable to almost as comprehensive quantitative analysis, and hint at a deeper relationship with symplectic geometry.
summary: 几何学和物理学之间的主动反馈贯穿于自然研究的基本层面，并且在弦理论中至关重要。特别是复杂代数几何方法带来了无与伦比的丰富解，数量级达到数百个数量级，而完全意想不到的镜像对称性的发现也得到了回报。然而，最近的发展表明，存在丰富的额外可能性，这些可能性是通过某些乍一看似乎是非代数的概括而成为可能的。然而，它们在整体镜像对称框架内非常一致，适合几乎同样全面的定量分析，并暗示与辛几何有更深层次的关系。

title: Chirality loss during brane merging: a universal power law from the Jackiw-Rebbi index
abstract: We investigate the rate at which chiral fermion localisation is lost when two domain walls merge in extra-dimensional braneworld scenarios, using the $(1+1)$-dimensional Jackiw-Rebbi framework as a controlled analytical laboratory. As the inter-brane separation $d$ decreases, left- and right-handed zero modes hybridise and chiral asymmetry is progressively lost. We show that the spatial separation between the chiral zero modes follows a universal power law $|\Delta_{\mathrm{abs}}|\propto d^{\gamma}$ in the merging limit $d\to 0^{+}$, with the critical exponent $\gamma$ determined solely by the Jackiw-Rebbi topological index $N_{\mathrm{JR}}$, and independent of the fermionic mass gap, the integrability of the scalar sector, and the detailed shape of the domain wall profile. Comparing the integrable sine-Gordon model with four members of the non-integrable double sine-Gordon family, all sharing $N_{\mathrm{JR}}=1$, we find $\gamma\in[0.930,0.985]$. For the sine-Gordon model we derive the closed-form overlap integral $I(d)=2d/\sinh(2d)$, from which the exact chiral separation follows as a ratio of hyperbolic functions without free parameters. This result identifies $\gamma$ as the crossover plateau of a local effective exponent $\gamma_{\mathrm{eff}}(d)$, explaining the sub-unit value analytically and tracing the universality to the Pöschl-Teller structure of the $N_{\mathrm{JR}}=1$ zero mode. The universality of $\gamma$ implies that the rate of four-dimensional Yukawa coupling collapse during brane merging is a topological invariant, insensitive to the microscopic scalar dynamics generating the walls.
summary:
我们使用 $(1+1)$ 维 Jackiw-Rebbi 框架作为受控分析实验室，研究了当两个畴壁在超维膜世界场景中合并时手性费米子定位丢失的速率。随着膜间分离 $d$ 的减小，左手和右手零模式杂交，手性不对称性逐渐消失。我们证明，手性零模之间的空间分离遵循通用幂律 $|\Delta_{\mathrm{abs}}|\propto d^{\gamma}$ 在合并极限 $d\to 0^{+}$ 内，临界指数 $\gamma$ 仅由 Jackiw-Rebbi 拓扑指数 $N_{\mathrm{JR}}$ 确定，并且与费米子质量隙无关，可积性标量扇区的形状，以及磁畴壁轮廓的详细形状。将可积正弦戈登模型与不可积双正弦戈登家族的四个成员（均共享 $N_{\mathrm{JR}}=1$）进行比较，我们发现 $\gamma\in[0.930,0.985]$。对于正弦戈登模型，我们推导出闭合形式重叠积分 $I(d)=2d/\sinh(2d)$，从中可以得出精确的手性分离，即没有自由参数的双曲函数的比率。

该结果将 $\gamma$ 识别为局部有效指数 $\gamma_{\mathrm{eff}}(d)$ 的交叉平台，分析地解释了子单位值，并将普适性追溯到 $N_{\mathrm{JR}}=1$ 零模式的 Pöschl-Teller 结构。 $\gamma$ 的普遍性意味着膜合并过程中四维汤川耦合崩溃的速率是一个拓扑不变量，对生成壁的微观标量动力学不敏感。

title: Multicritical points of gravitational solitons and a black hole in four dimensions
abstract: We present the first realization of multicritical points in four-dimensional general relativity, specifically within the context of Plebański nonlinear electrodynamics, using a polynomial structural function denoted as $\mathcal{H}(P)$. We show that this construction provides a systematic mechanism to engineer multicritical behavior in gravitational systems. By establishing an explicit mapping between matter theories expressed as power series in the Maxwell invariant $F$ and the Plebański formulation, we construct new families of electrically charged asymptotically anti-de Sitter black holes and magnetically charged solitons. In the grand-canonical ensemble, we analyze their thermodynamic properties and uncover a rich phase structure. We demonstrate that the soliton sector develops multiple swallowtail structures, signaling first-order phase transitions and allowing the coexistence of several magnetically charged solitons with a single electrically charged black hole. These configurations define multicritical points that generalize previously known triple points. We further show that the number of coexisting phases is controlled by the degree of the polynomial structural function, providing a direct link between the nonlinear electrodynamics couplings and the thermodynamic phase structure. In contrast, the black hole branch does not display swallowtail behavior, and it does not allow multiple electrically charged black holes to coexist with a magnetically charged soliton.
summary:
我们首次实现了四维广义相对论中的多临界点，特别是在 Plebański 非线性电动力学的背景下，使用表示为 $\mathcal{H}(P)$ 的多项式结构函数。我们表明，这种结构提供了一种系统机制来设计引力系统中的多临界行为。通过在麦克斯韦不变量 $F$ 中表示为幂级数的物质理论和普列班斯基公式之间建立明确的映射，我们构建了新的带电渐近反德西特黑洞和带磁孤子族。在大正则系综中，我们分析了它们的热力学性质并揭示了丰富的相结构。我们证明，孤子扇区会形成多个燕尾结构，发出一级相变信号，并允许多个带磁孤子与单个带电黑洞共存。这些配置定义了概括了先前已知的三相点的多临界点。

我们进一步表明，共存相的数量由多项式结构函数的次数控制，从而提供了非线性电动力学耦合和热力学相结构之间的直接联系。相比之下，黑洞分支不表现出燕尾行为，并且它不允许多个带电黑洞与带磁孤子共存。

title: Defect Conformal Manifolds along RG Domain Walls between $\mathbb Z_N$-Parafermions and Minimal Models
abstract: We investigate the renormalization group (RG) domain walls interpolating between the $\mathbb{Z}_N$ parafermion theory (the critical $N$-state Potts model) and the Virasoro minimal model $\mathcal{M}_{N+1}$. These flows are genuinely non-perturbative and an explicit construction of Gaiotto type RG domain wall remains elusive. We bypass this limitation by employing a bottom-up approach centered on the emergence of ``phantom currents". By tracking the preserved non-invertible symmetries ($\mathfrak{so}(3)_N$) along the flow, we extract the exact spectrum of these currents localized on the defect. We demonstrate that the presence of a spin-1 phantom current allows the interface to be marginally deformed, dynamically generating a continuous defect conformal manifold. Furthermore, we show that an extra spin-2 operator, crucially as a $W^{(3)}$-algebra descendant of the spin-1 phantom current, rigidly constrains the UV-IR stress tensor mixing via the cluster decomposition principle. This algebraic framework enables the exact computation of the parameter-dependent transmission rate across the conformal manifold, which we observe strictly vanishes in the large-$N$ limit as a consequence of macroscopic target space collapse.
summary:
我们研究了$\mathbb{Z}_N$ parafermion理论（临界$N$状态Potts模型）和Virasoro最小模型$\mathcal{M}_{N+1}$之间插值的重正化群（RG）域壁。这些流动确实是非扰动的，并且 Gaiotto 型 RG 畴壁的明确构造仍然难以捉摸。我们通过采用以“幻影电流”的出现为中心的自下而上的方法绕过了这一限制。通过跟踪沿流动保留的不可逆对称性 ($\mathfrak{so}(3)_N$)，我们提取了位于缺陷上的这些电流的精确频谱。我们证明了 spin-1 幻影电流的存在允许界面稍微变形，动态地生成连续的缺陷共形流形。此外，我们证明了额外的spin-2 算子，关键是作为 spin-1 幻象电流的 $W^{(3)}$ 代数后代，通过簇分解原理严格约束 UV-IR 应力张量混合。

这种代数框架能够精确计算共形流形上与参数相关的传输速率，我们观察到由于宏观目标空间崩溃，传输速率在大 $N$ 限制中严格消失。

title: Flux Quantization of Type IIA in Unstable K-Theory
abstract: The traditional conjecture that RR-flux is quantized in stable K-cohomology fails to account for the presence of NS-brane sources: These impose nonlinear relations -- reductions of the famous quadratic relation on M-brane flux -- that can only be captured by unstable nonabelian cohomology theories. Here we consider a deformation of unstable K-theory which properly quantizes the fluxes coupling to D0/D2/NS5-branes, find a twisted version that quantizes also the fluxes coupling to NS1/D4-branes, and show that this oxidizes to a proper electromagnetic quantization of M-brane fluxes.
summary: RR 通量在稳定 K 上同调中量化的传统猜想无法解释 NS 膜源的存在：这些强加了非线性关系——著名的 M 膜通量二次关系的约简——只能通过不稳定的非阿贝尔上同调理论来捕获。在这里，我们考虑不稳定 K 理论的变形，它正确地量化了与 D0/D2/NS5-膜耦合的通量，找到了一个扭曲的版本，也量化了与 NS1/D4-膜耦合的通量，并表明这氧化为 M-膜通量的适当电磁量化。

title: Pseudorandom Dynamics in the SYK Model and Cryptographic Censorship in JT Gravity
abstract: We argue that the SYK model provides a conditional realization of Cryptographic Censorship in JT gravity. By using the Weingarten calculus and random matrix universality, we prove that the SYK disorder ensemble is an approximate unitary $k$-design for all $k=\poly(N)$, with deviation controlled by the spectral form factor. We then formulate the planted-SYK hardness conjecture and provide evidence from spectral universality and the low-degree polynomial framework. Under this conjecture, the approximate design becomes a gravitationally pseudorandom unitary. Together with the efficient causal wedge reconstruction in JT gravity, this leads to the conclusion that typical states in the SYK microcanonical window must have event horizons in their bulk duals, with the horizonless fraction doubly exponentially small. We further identify the regularized geodesic length of the maximal interior slice as the explicit distinguishing operator. Its prediction gap grows linearly with time due to the stretching of the black hole interior, linking Cryptographic Censorship to the complexity equals volume conjecture.
summary: 我们认为 SYK 模型提供了 JT 引力中密码审查的有条件实现。通过使用 Weingarten 微积分和随机矩阵普适性，我们证明 SYK 无序系综是所有 $k=\poly(N)$ 的近似酉 $k$ 设计，偏差由谱形状因子控制。然后，我们制定了 Planted-SYK 硬度猜想，并提供了谱普适性和低次多项式框架的证据。在这个猜想下，近似设计成为引力伪随机酉。结合 JT 引力中有效的因果楔重建，这得出这样的结论：SYK 微正则窗口中的典型状态必须在其体对偶中具有事件视界，而无视界部分呈指数倍小。我们进一步将最大内部切片的正则化测地线长度确定为显式区分算子。由于黑洞内部的拉伸，其预测差距随着时间线性增长，将密码审查与复杂性等于体积猜想联系起来。

title: Quantum-Corrected Q-balls in the Friedberg-Lee-Sirlin Model
abstract: We study the real-time quantum dynamics of Q-balls in the Friedberg-Lee-Sirlin model within the inhomogeneous Hartree approximation. The mean fields are evolved self-consistently with the leading quantum two-point functions, which are implemented numerically through a stochastic ensemble representation. After introducing a renormalized formulation and a classical-limit scaling, we simulate single-Q-ball configurations in $3+1$ dimensions and compare their quantum-corrected evolution with the corresponding classical dynamics. We find a clear separation between a classical regime, where quantum fluctuations remain small and the evolution closely follows the classical solution, and a quantum regime, where the fluctuation sector carries a sizable fraction of the Noether charge. We also observe a periodic exchange of Noether charge between the mean fields and the fluctuation modes within the Hartree approximation. We further investigate the stability of quantum-corrected Q-balls and find an intermediate window in which configurations that are classically stable become unstable once Hartree fluctuations are included. Our results provide a first step toward real-time quantum simulations of Q-balls in renormalizable two-field soliton models.
summary:
我们研究了非齐次 Hartree 近似中 Friedberg-Lee-Sirlin 模型中 Q 球的实时量子动力学。平均场与领先的量子两点函数自洽地演化，这些函数通过随机系综表示在数值上实现。在引入重正化公式和经典极限缩放后，我们模拟了 3+1$ 维度的单 Q 球配置，并将其量子校正演化与相应的经典动力学进行了比较。我们发现经典体系和量子体系之间有明显的区别，在经典体系中，量子涨落仍然很小，并且演化密切遵循经典解决方案，在量子体系中，涨落扇区带有相当大一部分的诺特电荷。我们还观察到哈特里近似内平均场和涨落模式之间诺特电荷的周期性交换。我们进一步研究了量子校正 Q 球的稳定性，并找到了一个中间窗口，其中一旦包含 Hartree 波动，经典稳定的配置就会变得不稳定。

我们的结果为可重正化双场孤子模型中 Q 球的实时量子模拟迈出了第一步。

title: Some universalities in the partition functions of low-dimension gravity models
abstract: In this work, first we discuss the connections between various low-dimensional quantum gravity models, including 3d Chern-Simons, 2d JT and 2d BF theory, 2d Liouville and 2d WZW, and 1d Schwarzian through holography and dimension reduction, and discuss some universalities in their partition functions. Then, we specifically examine the JT partition function and the newly found partition function of $\mathcal{N}=(2,2)$ on $S^2$ and $\text{AdS}_2$ and discuss their similarities and therefore examine our proposed universalities further. We change the parameters in each model and based on the change in the structure of the partition function, strengthen our conjectures. We also use eigenfunctions, spectra and the behaviors of Wheeler-DeWitt wavefunctions to generate more universalities between these low-dimensional quantum gravity models, specifically in their partition functions. Then, we use entanglement entropy, complexity and RG flows, particularly in the context of wormholes, to find more universalities in quantum gravity models. Finally, we use the new results about the connections between wormholes and defects to discuss our universalities further.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们首先讨论各种低维量子引力模型之间的联系，包括 3d Chern-Simons、2d JT 和 2d BF 理论、2d Liouville 和 2d WZW、以及通过全息和降维的 1d Schwarzian 模型，并讨论它们配分函数的一些普遍性。然后，我们专门检查 $S^2$ 和 $\text{AdS}_2$ 上的 JT 配分函数和新发现的 $\mathcal{N}=(2,2)$ 配分函数，并讨论它们的相似性，从而进一步检验我们提出的普遍性。我们改变每个模型中的参数，并根据配分函数结构的变化，强化我们的猜想。我们还使用本征函数、光谱和惠勒-德威特波函数的行为来生成这些低维量子引力模型之间的更多普遍性，特别是在它们的配分函数中。然后，我们使用纠缠熵、复杂性和 RG 流，特别是在虫洞的背景下，来发现量子引力模型的更多普遍性。最后，我们利用有关虫洞和缺陷之间联系的新结果来进一步讨论我们的普遍性。

title: Negative entropy in scrambling black holes
abstract: We present a microscopic statistical-mechanical foundation for interpreting the horizon area of a scrambling black hole as coherent information, equivalently negative conditional quantum entropy, in Hawking's pair-creation picture. We derive the entropy increase induced in a black hole when an infalling object is absorbed and scrambled into its microscopic degrees of freedom. Up to finite-reservoir corrections, this increase takes a canonical form at the Hawking temperature, regardless of the entropy carried by the infalling object. Applying this entropy formula to an incoming mode paired by time reversal with an outgoing Hawking radiation mode, we show that their partition-function contributions cancel in the coherent-information balance associated with the horizon area. The resulting area response is then determined only by the energy flux, in agreement with the black-hole first law.
summary: 我们提出了一个微观统计力学基础，用于将扰乱黑洞的视界区域解释为相干信息，相当于霍金配对图像中的负条件量子熵。我们推导出当一个下落的物体被吸收并扰乱到其微观自由度时在黑洞中引起的熵增加。在有限储库校正之前，无论坠落物体携带的熵如何，这种增加在霍金温度下都呈现规范形式。将此熵公式应用于由时间反转与传出霍金辐射模式配对的传入模式，我们表明它们的配分函数贡献在与地平线区域相关的相干信息平衡中被抵消。由此产生的面积响应仅由能量通量决定，与黑洞第一定律一致。

title: A Celestial Description of Planar Super-Yang-Mills Theory
abstract: We extend the celestial Roiban-Spradlin-Volovich-Witten (RSVW) formalism developed in our previous work to minitwistor superspace. Using the Drummond-Henn formula for all tree-level amplitudes in N=4 supersymmetric Yang-Mills (SYM) theory, we construct tree-level N^k-MHV celestial leaf amplitudes and show that their minitwistor-Fourier transforms are given by integrals over moduli spaces of families of minitwistor lines. We also adapt the Korchemsky-Sokatchev twistor-transform techniques for gluon amplitudes to the minitwistor-Fourier transforms of leaf amplitudes. We then describe two dynamical formulations of these celestial amplitudes. First, we show that semiclassical correlators of Wilson operators supported on algebraic cycles in minitwistor superspace act as generating functionals for tree-level N^k-MHV leaf-gluon amplitudes. Second, we analyse a semiclassical minitwistor sigma model, identify its vertex operators, and construct from them celestial gluon operators that close on the S-algebra in the semiclassical approximation; their leading-trace semiclassical correlators again reproduce the tree-level N^k-MHV leaf amplitudes. A companion paper extends this construction beyond tree level, in particular to one-loop amplitudes via a celestial version of the Brandhuber-Spence-Travaglini formalism.
summary:
我们将我们之前的工作中开发的天体 Roiban-Spradlin-Volovich-Witten (RSVW) 形式主义扩展到微扭超空间。使用 N=4 超对称 Yang-Mills (SYM) 理论中所有树级振幅的 Drummond-Henn 公式，我们构造了树级 N^k-MHV 天叶振幅，并表明它们的微扭傅里叶变换是由微扭线族模空间上的积分给出的。我们还将胶子振幅的 Korchemsky-Sokatchev 扭转变换技术应用于叶振幅的微扭转傅立叶变换。然后我们描述这些天体振幅的两个动力学公式。首先，我们证明了在微扭超空间中的代数环上支持的 Wilson 算子的半经典相关器充当树级 N^k-MHV 叶胶子振幅的生成泛函。其次，我们分析了半经典微扭西格玛模型，识别了其顶点算子，并根据它们构造了在半经典近似中接近S代数的天体胶子算子；它们的前导迹线半经典相关器再次再现树级 N^k-MHV 叶振幅。

一篇配套论文将这种结构扩展到树级别之外，特别是通过 Brandhuber-Spence-Travaglini 形式主义的天体版本扩展到单环振幅。

title: The Diagrammar of Quantum Magnusian
abstract: The logarithm of the time-evolution operator has been termed Magnusian, on account of the fact that its expansion describes the Magnus series. The diagrammatic expansion and computation of the classical Magnusian has been completely established in terms of tree graphs and their Hopf algebra. Recent works initiated extensions into quantum field theory, revealing general structures of loop expansions while finding intriguing relations between different diagrams. In this work, we advance the loop expansion further by providing an efficient diagrammatic algorithm to calculate the weight factor of each graph in the quantum Magnusian, known as the Murua coefficient. This is achieved by incorporating two complementary perspectives on the Magnusian at the same time: the color basis and the black-and-white basis. We extract the Murua coefficients from the Magnus series by utilizing these two bases while implementing an exponentiated Wick contraction. In turn, we identify the loop-level extension of Murua's recursive formula. Eventually, we establish a set of edge contraction rules which facilitate a direct recursive computation of the Murua coefficients at the purely diagrammatic level, without referencing or directly manipulating the underlying Magnus expansion. This shows that the matrix elements of the quantum Magnusian can be computed from graph manipulations alone.
summary:
时间演化算子的​​对数被称为马格努斯算子，因为它的展开式描述了马格努斯级数。经典马格努斯算式的图解展开和计算已经在树图及其Hopf代数方面完全建立起来。最近的工作发起了量子场论的扩展，揭示了环展开的一般结构，同时发现了不同图之间有趣的关系。在这项工作中，我们通过提供有效的图解算法来计算量子马格努斯中每个图的权重因子（称为 Murua 系数），进一步推进循环展开。这是通过同时结合马格努斯派的两种互补观点来实现的：彩色基础和黑白基础。我们利用这两个基数从 Magnus 级数中提取 Murua 系数，同时实现指数 Wick 收缩。反过来，我们确定了 Murua 递归公式的循环级扩展。

最终，我们建立了一组边缘收缩规则，有助于在纯粹的图解级别上直接递归计算 Murua 系数，而无需引用或直接操作底层的马格努斯展开。这表明量子马格努斯矩阵的矩阵元素可以仅通过图操作来计算。

title: Bulk Motion in Global AdS$_3$ from the Boundary Energy-Density Perspective
abstract: We study how bulk propagation in global AdS$_3$ is encoded in boundary energy densities of the dual CFT$_2$ on the cylinder. A key feature of the global geometry, which is absent in the Poincaré-patch description, is that a null excitation emitted from the boundary reaches the antipodal boundary point after $\Delta\tau=\pi$ and returns to the original boundary point after $\Delta\tau=2\pi$. We show that this periodic boundary-to-boundary propagation is reflected in the CFT energy density as chiral peaks that meet at the antipodal point and reappear after one global period. For a wave-packet state, the leading energy density consists of two chiral peaks moving along the boundary light-cone directions; their relative weights encode the impact parameter of the corresponding bulk null ray. For a state prepared by a heavy operator with Euclidean regulator, the exact cylinder stress tensor gives two periodic chiral pulses moving along the boundary light-cone directions. These pulses reach the antipodal point and return to the original point at the same global times as the radial null geodesic in the bulk. Thus the boundary energy density captures the boundary-to-boundary propagation and periodicity of localized bulk excitations in global AdS$_3$.
summary:
我们研究了全局 AdS$_3$ 中的整体传播如何编码在圆柱体上双 CFT$_2$ 的边界能量密度中。全局几何的一个关键特征是庞加莱补丁描述中所没有的，即从边界发出的零激励在 $\Delta\tau=\pi$ 之后到达对映边界点，并在 $\Delta\tau=2\pi$ 之后返回到原始边界点。我们表明，这种周期性的边界到边界传播在 CFT 能量密度中反映为在对映点相遇并在一个全局周期后重新出现的手性峰。对于波包态，主导能量密度由两个沿边界光锥方向移动的手性峰组成；它们的相对权重编码相应块零射线的影响参数。对于由具有欧几里得调节器的重型算子准备的状态，精确的圆柱应力张量给出了沿边界光锥方向移动的两个周期性手性脉冲。这些脉冲在与体中的径向零测地线相同的全局时间到达对映点并返回到原始点。

因此，边界能量密度捕获了全局 AdS$_3$ 中局部体激励的边界到边界传播和周期性。

title: Degenerate Bifurcations and Universal Relaxation Scaling in Black Hole Thermodynamics
abstract: We present a dynamical systems approach to black hole thermodynamic criticality based on bifurcation equations. We construct an effective thermodynamic landscape in which black holes relax toward equilibrium fixed points. To describe this process, we introduce a flow parameter $\tau$, interpreted as a phenomenological relaxation time, which governs the approach toward equilibrium configurations in thermodynamic state space. Near critical points, the thermodynamic flow simplifies into universal mathematical forms, which allows different black holes to be grouped into different universality classes based on their critical behaviour. Our analysis further shows critical slowing down, with relaxation timescales determined entirely by the local bifurcation structure.
summary: 我们提出了一种基于分岔方程的黑洞热力学临界性的动力系统方法。我们构建了一个有效的热力学景观，其中黑洞向平衡固定点松弛。为了描述这个过程，我们引入了一个流动参数 $\tau$，解释为唯象弛豫时间，它控制着热力学状态空间中平衡配置的方法。在临界点附近，热力学流简化为通用数学形式，这使得不同的黑洞可以根据其临界行为分为不同的通用类别。我们的分析进一步显示了严重的减速，弛豫时间尺度完全由局部分叉结构决定。

title: Finite-$N$ BMN index across all vacuum sectors
abstract: We compute the finite-$N$ Witten index of BMN matrix quantum mechanics after summing over all partition-labeled supersymmetric vacuum sectors. Starting from the unitary-matrix integral for each sector, we develop two complementary evaluation methods: a symmetric-group character expansion, which reduces each fixed fugacity order to a finite combinatorial sum, and a residue expansion in which the contributing poles are organized by rooted trees, with a colored-tree generalization for multi-partition sectors. Direct integration and constant-term extraction provide independent checks in explicit examples. We evaluate every vacuum sector for $N\leq 9$. In the equal-fugacity expansion, the coefficients near charges $j\sim N^2$ show entropy growth of order $N^2$, and the sector sum does not cancel this growth. The finite-$N$ data also reveal a nontrivial sectoral organization: near $j=N^2$, the sector giving the largest contribution changes with $N$, from single-partition sectors at small rank to double-partition sectors starting at $N=5$. We call this phenomenon dominance switching. These results provide a quantitative finite-$N$ foundation for using the BMN index as a diagnostic of protected plane-wave black-hole microstates and suggest a bulk interpretation in terms of plane-wave black holes dressed by macroscopic M2 giant gravitons, analogous to dual dressed black holes in $AdS_5\times S^5$.
summary:
在对所有分区标记的超对称真空扇区求和后，我们计算 BMN 矩阵量子力学的有限 $N$ 维滕指数。从每个扇区的酉矩阵积分开始，我们开发了两种互补的评估方法：对称群特征扩展，将每个固定逸度阶减少到有限组合和，以及剩余扩展，其中贡献极点由有根树组织，并具有多分区扇区的彩色树概括。直接积分和常数项提取在显式示例中提供独立检查。我们评估每个真空扇区的价值为 $N\leq 9$。在等逸度展开中，电荷$j\sim N^2$附近的系数表现出$N^2$阶的熵增长，并且扇区和不会抵消这种增长。有限$N$数据还揭示了一个不平凡的部门组织：在$j=N^2$附近，贡献最大的部门随$N$变化，从小等级的单分区部门到从$N=5$开始的双分区部门。我们将这种现象称为优势切换。

这些结果为使用 BMN 指数作为受保护的平面波黑洞微观状态的诊断提供了定量的有限 $N$ 基础，并提出了对由宏观 M2 巨引力子修饰的平面波黑洞的整体解释，类似于 $AdS_5\times S^5$ 中的双修饰黑洞。

title: Fermion renormalized vertex functions, effective mass, and condensate in an external Yang-Mills gauge field
abstract: We investigate the renormalized fermion-gluon vertex, the fermion effective mass, and the fermion condensate when the fermion propagates in an external Yang-Mills gauge field. We use an exact Green's function for the Dirac operator in a non-Abelian plane-wave gauge field to construct the renormalized vertex function, calculate the on-shell fermion self-energy, and the background-dependent condensate. We consider both the background and operator fields in the axial gauge $k^{\mu } \mathcal{A}_{\mu }^{a}=0$, thereby preserving the gauge. Its applications to strong-field QCD and non-Abelian Schwinger physics are discussed.
summary: 我们研究了费米子在外部杨-米尔斯规范场中传播时的重整化费米子-胶子顶点、费米子有效质量和费米子凝聚态。我们在非阿贝尔平面波规范场中使用狄拉克算子的精确格林函数来构造重正化顶点函数，计算壳上费米子自能和背景相关凝聚态。我们考虑轴向规范 $k^{\mu } \mathcal{A}_{\mu }^{a}=0$ 中的背景场和算子场，从而保留规范。讨论了它在强场 QCD 和非阿贝尔施温格物理中的应用。

title: A Casimir obstruction to asymptotically flat black-brane completions of non-supersymmetric 7-branes
abstract: We study axisymmetric 7-brane solutions in the dilaton-gravity sector of 10d supergravity, including the backreaction of the Casimir energy induced by monodromies around the transverse circle. Without Casimir energy, we find that the system is analytically solvable and admits locally flat asymptotics with arbitrary deficit angles, but the corresponding solutions contain a naked singularity at finite proper distance. We investigate whether this singularity can be replaced by a regular finite-horizon black-brane core once Casimir backreaction is included. We find that, within our ansatz, Casimir backreaction obstructs an asymptotically locally flat black-brane completion of the naked 7-brane solution.
summary: 我们研究了 10d 超重力膨胀子重力扇区中的轴对称 7 膜解，包括由横圆周围的单峰引起的卡西米尔能量的反反应。在没有卡西米尔能量的情况下，我们发现系统是解析可解的，并且允许具有任意赤字角的局部平坦渐近，但相应的解在有限真距离处包含裸奇点。我们研究一旦包含卡西米尔反反应，这种奇点是否可以被常规的有限视界黑膜核取代。我们发现，在我们的 ansatz 中，卡西米尔逆反应阻碍了裸 7 膜解决方案的渐近局部平坦黑膜完成。

title: Endpoint formulation and Molien--Weyl structure for the \(N=2\), large--\(d\) BFSS/BMN models
abstract: We study the \(N=2\), large--\(d\) sector of BFSS/BMN-type matrix quantum mechanics on the lattice in the Gaussian regime. We develop a radial endpoint formulation in which the bulk, gauge, and longitudinal degrees of freedom are integrated out, leaving transverse endpoint variables governed by an effective holonomy potential. We show that this planar endpoint formulation is equivalent to the angular Molien--Weyl description of the gauge-projected partition function, up to a universal spectator factor. This relation allows the low-temperature expansion of the endpoint partition function to be obtained from the Molien--Weyl result, whose quadratic coefficient \(d(d+1)/2\) counts Gaussian singlet states above the vacuum. We then analyze the continuum limit of the quadratic coefficient and show that it separates into a Gaussian contribution, a \(D\)-channel, and a \(\beta\)-channel. The naive Gaussian term becomes trivial, while the exact holonomy kernel generates finite continuum contributions through singular dependence on the endpoint Gaussian width and anisotropic coupling. We then study the geometry of the holonomy potential and show that its relevant saddle is a constrained boundary saddle on the aligned branch, rather than an unconstrained critical point. The associated transverse expansion captures the local saddle geometry, but any finite polynomial truncation has a trivial continuum limit. Finally, we introduce a non-polynomial toy model based on \(V_{\rm toy}(B)=-\log\cosh B\), which provides a completion of the transverse expansion and reproduces exactly the continuum \(D\)-channel contribution \(-2d\). This prepares the geometric interpretation of the \(D\)-channel as a Wishart--Stiefel entropy associated with an emergent four-dimensional geometry embedded \(\mathbb R^d\) in the endpoint formulation.
summary:
我们研究高斯体系晶格上 BFSS/BMN 型矩阵量子力学的 \(N=2\) 大--\(d\) 扇区。我们开发了一种径向端点公式，其中体积、规格和纵向自由度被积分出来，留下由有效完整势控制的横向端点变量。我们证明，这种平面端点公式相当于规范投影配分函数的角度 Molien-Weyl 描述，直至通用观察者因子。这种关系允许从 Molien--Weyl 结果中获得端点配分函数的低温展开，其二次系数 \(d(d+1)/2\) 计算真空以上的高斯单线态。然后，我们分析二次系数的连续极限，并表明它分为高斯贡献、\(D\) 通道和 \(\beta\) 通道。朴素的高斯项变得微不足道，而精确的完整核通过对端点高斯宽度和各向异性耦合的奇异依赖来生成有限的连续贡献。

然后，我们研究完整势的几何形状，并表明其相关鞍点是对齐分支上的受约束边界鞍点，而不是不受约束的临界点。相关的横向扩展捕获了局部鞍座几何形状，但任何有限多项式截断都具有微不足道的连续统极限。最后，我们引入一个基于\(V_{\rm toy}(B)=-\log\cosh B\)的非多项式玩具模型，它提供了横向扩展的完成，并精确地再现了连续\(D\)通道贡献\(-2d\)。这将 \(D\) 通道的几何解释准备为与端点公式中嵌入 \(\mathbb R^d\) 的新兴四维几何相关的 Wishart-Stiefel 熵。

title: Khovanov complexes for bipartite links
abstract: Recently, for a limited class for bipartite links, the complicated Khovanov-Rozansky matrix factorization technique was reduced to an analogue of elementary Kauffman-Khovanov cycle calculus for an arbitrary $N$. In this note, we demonstrate the consistency of such reduction with the computation of the bipartite Khovanov polynomials for $N=2$. Namely, we explain how the Kauffman-Khovanov $2^2$-hypercube is shrinked to the bipartite 3-hypercube.
summary: 最近，对于二部链接的有限类，复杂的 Khovanov-Rozansky 矩阵分解技术被简化为任意 $N$ 的基本 Kauffman-Khovanov 循环演算的类似物。在本文中，我们证明了这种归约与计算 $N=2$ 的二部 Khovanov 多项式的一致性。也就是说，我们解释了 Kauffman-Khovanov $2^2$-超立方体如何收缩为二分 3-超立方体。

title: Null Strings Gauged and Reloaded, I: Null Strings Have Carroll-Weyl Gauge Symmetry
abstract: Null strings, strings with Carrollian worldsheets, are traditionally described by the Isberg-Lindström-Sundborg-Theodoridis (ILST) action, which is obtained via a tensionless limit of standard tensile strings. In a recent work, we observed that the ILST action enjoys an overlooked partial-gauge symmetry whose existence calls into question the consistency of {standard} null strings analysis found in the literature. In this paper, we show that the Carrollian geometry provides us with two Weyl scaling options, in contrast to a single Weyl scaling available for the ordinary tensile string worldsheet. Defining the null string theory by the action that realizes the two Carroll-Weyl scalings as well as the 2D diffeomorphisms as local (gauge) symmetries, we construct the new null string action. We show that the ILST action is obtained after fixing one of the two Carroll-Weyl scalings of the action that we construct, and that the residual part of this symmetry is precisely the overlooked partial-gauge symmetry. We hence clarify the Carroll-geometric origin of the overlooked symmetry and pave the way for a consistent quantization of null strings.
summary: 空弦，即具有卡罗尔世界表的弦，传统上通过 Isberg-Lindström-Sundborg-Theodoridis (ILST) 作用来描述，该作用是通过标准拉伸弦的无张力极限获得的。在最近的一项工作中，我们观察到 ILST 作用具有被忽视的部分规范对称性，其存在使文献中发现的{标准}空字符串分析的一致性受到质疑。在本文中，我们表明卡罗尔几何为我们提供了两个 Weyl 标度选项，与普通拉伸弦世界表可用的单个 Weyl 标度形成对比。通过实现两个 Carroll-Weyl 标度以及作为局部（规范）对称性的二维微分同胚的作用来定义空弦理论，我们构造了新的空弦作用。我们证明了 ILST 作用是在固定我们构造的作用的两个 Carroll-Weyl 标度之一后获得的，并且这种对称性的剩余部分正是被忽视的偏规范对称性。因此，我们澄清了被忽视的对称性的卡罗尔几何起源，并为空字符串的一致量化铺平了道路。

title: Hard cutoff and gauge theories
abstract: According to usual calculations, the use of a hard cutoff $\Lambda$ in gauge theories leads to a violation of gauge invariance. This seems to generate a tension between gauge theories and the Wilsonian effective field theory (EFT) paradigm, where $\Lambda$ has the physical meaning of ultimate scale of the theory, the scale above which the latter has to be replaced by its UV completion. In the present work, considering the Euler-Heisenberg correction to the free Maxwell action, we present a way to introduce the Wilsonian hard UV cutoff $\Lambda$ that preserves gauge invariance at the quantum level. For both scalar and fermionic QED, we recover the well-known Euler-Heisenberg result obtained within proper-time regularization, apart from terms that are generically cutoff-suppressed. These terms, periodic in the inverse background field, might become relevant in regimes where the latter probes scales not much smaller than $\Lambda$. On the theoretical side, the methods developed in the present work represent a first step towards a new (closer in spirit to the Wegner-Houghton construction) realization of the Wilsonian renormalization group program in gauge theories.
summary: 根据通常的计算，在规范理论中使用硬截止$\Lambda$会导致违反规范不变性。这似乎在规范理论和威尔逊有效场论（EFT）范式之间产生了紧张关系，其中 $\Lambda$ 具有理论最终尺度的物理意义，高于该尺度后者必须被其 UV 完成所取代。在目前的工作中，考虑到对自由麦克斯韦作用的欧拉-海森堡校正，我们提出了一种引入威尔逊硬紫外截止 $\Lambda$ 的方法，该方法在量子水平上保持规范不变性。对于标量和费米子 QED，我们恢复了在原时正则化中获得的众所周知的欧拉-海森堡结果，除了一般截止抑制的项之外。这些项在逆背景场中是周期性的，可能在后者探测尺度不小于 $\Lambda$ 的情况下变得相关。在理论方面，本工作中开发的方法代表了规范理论中威尔逊重正化群程序的新实现（在精神上更接近韦格纳-霍顿构造）的第一步。

title: Proof of Quantum Conformal Invariance in $\mathcal N=4$ Super-Yang-Mills Theory via $\mathcal N=1$ Superfields
abstract: Using the $\mathcal{N}=1$ superfield formalism, we prove that the superconformal symmetry of $\mathcal{N}=4$ super-Yang-Mills theory is preserved in the quantum theory. We demonstrate that the $\mathcal{N}=1$ calculation is sufficient to guarantee the full $\mathcal{N}=4$ supersymmetry, and show that the results are exact without receiving any higher-order corrections.
summary: 利用$\mathcal{N}=1$超场形式，我们证明了$\mathcal{N}=4$超杨-米尔斯理论的超共形对称性在量子理论中得到了保留。我们证明了 $\mathcal{N}=1$ 的计算足以保证 $\mathcal{N}=4$ 的超对称性，并且表明结果是精确的，无需接受任何高阶修正。

title: Krylov Complexity for Plane Wave Matrix Model
abstract: We study Krylov complexity in BMN Plane Wave Matrix Model at large mass deformation. We consider various consistent reductions of the matrix model that allow us to perform a Hamiltonian analysis which leads to different notions of the Krylov complexity. In the first part of the paper, we study the Krylov state complexity considering systematic reduction of $N=3$ and $N=4$ representations of the matrix model, which reveals a universal characteristic scaling for the Lanczos coefficients and fix them completely in terms of the mass deformation parameter. In the second part of the paper, we study the Krylov operator growth in the matrix model and compute the corresponding Lanczos coefficients. In both cases, we observe a \emph{linear} scaling of Lanczos coefficients with the mass parameter. The early time growth in Krylov complexity receives quadratic correction due to the presence of the massive deformation in the matrix model. Our analysis reveals that such massive corrections appear at same order in time for both the notion of the Krylov complexity.
summary: 我们研究了大质量变形下 BMN 平面波矩阵模型中的 Krylov 复杂度。我们考虑矩阵模型的各种一致约简，使我们能够执行哈密顿分析，从而得出 Krylov 复杂度的不同概念。在本文的第一部分中，我们研究了考虑矩阵模型的 $N=3$ 和 $N=4$ 表示的系统化简的 Krylov 状态复杂性，这揭示了 Lanczos 系数的通用特征缩放，并根据质量变形参数完全修复它们。在论文的第二部分，我们研究了矩阵模型中的Krylov算子增长并计算了相应的Lanczos系数。在这两种情况下，我们观察到 Lanczos 系数与质量参数的 \emph{线性} 缩放。由于矩阵模型中存在大量变形，Krylov 复杂度的早期增长受到二次校正。我们的分析表明，对于克雷洛夫复杂度的概念来说，如此大规模的修正在时间上出现的顺序相同。

title: On Perturbatively Dressed Observables
abstract: A central lesson of gravity is that local observables are ill-defined. Coordinates themselves are a redundancy of description, so any particular point in spacetime is only meaningful once defined relationally by clocks, rulers, or asymptotic data. Despite extensive formal work on this subject, explicit calculations of the resulting gravitationally-dressed observables are more scarce. In this paper we perturbatively compute dressed matrix elements of local operators in electrodynamics and general relativity, including both potential and radiative photons and gravitons. Our expressions indicate that dressing is not ornamental: it universally induces kinematic singularities that can substantively reshape observables. We further show how dressing is mathematically equivalent to gauge fixing, as demonstrated by a dynamical temporal gauge in which the gauge-fixing vector is itself a geodesic fluid.
summary: 引力的一个核心教训是局部可观测值是不明确的。坐标本身是描述的冗余，因此时空中的任何特定点只有在由时钟、标尺或渐近数据相关定义后才有意义。尽管在这个主题上进行了大量的正式工作，但对由此产生的引力修饰的可观测值的明确计算却更加稀少。在本文中，我们扰动计算电动力学和广义相对论中局部算子的修饰矩阵元素，包括势和辐射光子和引力子。我们的表达表明着装不是装饰性的：它普遍引起运动奇点，可以实质性地重塑可观察到的东西。我们进一步展示了修整在数学上如何等同于规范固定，正如动态时间规范所证明的那样，其中规范固定矢量本身就是测地线流体。

title: Intersecting Surface Operators in 6d Holomorphic Field Theories
abstract: We study intersecting surface operators in 6d holomorphic field theories with the aim of unraveling associated quantum integrable structures. We first study the intersections of surface operators in 6d holomorphic Chern-Simons theory on $\mathbb{C}^3$. Computing their correlation function, we find a local operator at the intersection of the surface operators with a form reminiscent of the leading nontrivial term in the quasi-classical expansion of a rational $R$-matrix, as predicted by Costello. We provide evidence that this $R$-matrix-like operator satisfies a Yang-Baxter-type relation. We then derive the associated coproduct of the chiral algebra supported by surface operators from their OPE. We also study intersecting surface operators in 6d holomorphic BF theory and derive the local leading form of the corresponding $R$-matrix-like operator. When this theory is placed on twistor space, where it describes the self-dual sector of 4d Yang-Mills theory, this operator is expected to provide a local building block for quantum integrable structures anticipated in that setting.
summary: 我们研究 6 维全纯场论中的相交表面算子，目的是解开相关的量子可积结构。我们首先研究 $\mathbb{C}^3$ 上的 6d 全纯 Chern-Simons 理论中的曲面算子的交集。计算它们的相关函数，我们在表面算子的交点处找到一个局部算子，其形式让人想起有理 $R$ 矩阵的准经典展开中的主要非平凡项，正如科斯特洛所预测的那样。我们提供证据证明这个 $R$ 类矩阵算子满足 Yang-Baxter 型关系。然后，我们从 OPE 中导出表面算子支持的手性代数的相关余积。我们还研究了6d全纯BF理论中的相交曲面算子，并推导了相应的$R$类矩阵算子的局部主导形式。当该理论被放置在扭量空间上时，它描述了 4d Yang-Mills 理论的自对偶扇区，该算子有望为该设置中预期的量子可积结构提供局部构建块。

title: AKLT State is Indeed the Observation Process of a causal Hidden quantum Markov Model
abstract: We present a rigorous formulation of the spin-1 Affleck--Kennedy--Lieb--Tasaki (AKLT) state within the framework of hidden quantum Markov models (HQMMs). We show that the AKLT ground state admits a natural representation as the observable output of a causal HQMM, thereby endowing it with an underlying hidden quantum memory that is fully consistent with its standard finitely correlated (matrix product state) description. This viewpoint yields a compact and structurally transparent characterization of the AKLT chain as a quantum spin system equipped with intrinsic quantum memory. Our results further indicate that the HQMM framework provides a promising setting for analyzing measurement-based quantum computation (MBQC) and related information-processing tasks.
summary: 我们在隐量子马尔可夫模型 (HQMM) 的框架内提出了 spin-1 Affleck--Kennedy--Lieb--Tasaki (AKLT) 态的严格表述。我们证明 AKLT 基态允许自然表示作为因果 HQMM 的可观察输出，从而赋予它一个底层的隐藏量子存储器，该存储器与其标准有限相关（矩阵乘积状态）描述完全一致。这一观点产生了 AKLT 链作为配备固有量子存储器的量子自旋系统的紧凑且结构透明的表征。我们的结果进一步表明，HQMM 框架为分析基于测量的量子计算 (MBQC) 和相关信息处理任务提供了一个有前景的设置。

title: ODE/IM Correspondence at the Free-Fermion Point. Laguerre Wronskians, Shifted Symmetric Functions, and Quantum KdV
abstract: We consider the ODE/IM correspondence for the value $c=-2$ of the Virasoro central charge (free-fermion point) and the associated quantum KdV model $-$ the quantization of the second hamiltonian structure of the classical periodic KdV model. We prove that the ODE/IM correspondence is complete (in the sense of V. Bazhanov, S. Lukyanov, and A. Zamolodchikov), namely that any solution of the Bethe equations coincides with the spectrum of a rational extension of the (quantum) harmonic oscillator. To this end, on the ODE side we consider Crum$-$Darboux transformations of the harmonic oscillator and the associated Laguerre Wronskians, which are remarkable special functions parametrized by pairs of partitions which we study in depth. As a further result, on the IM side, we diagonalize explicitly the first three hamiltonian operators of quantum KdV (in the free field representation): the eigenstates are Schur functions and the eigenvalues are shifted symmetric functions on partitions. We give two applications of this result: i) we prove that the eigenvalues are given by the evaluation of the Newton symmetric polynomials at the poles of the associated monster potentials, as further conjectured by V. Bazhanov, S. Lukyanov, and A. Zamolodchikov; ii) we show that these hamiltonian operators also belong to the algebra of hamiltonian operators obtained by quantizing the first hamiltonian structure of the classical periodic dispersionless KdV model.
summary:
我们考虑 Virasoro 中心电荷（自由费米子点）的值 $c=-2$ 的 ODE/IM 对应关系以及相关的量子 KdV 模型 $-$ 经典周期 KdV 模型的第二哈密顿结构的量化。我们证明 ODE/IM 对应是完整的（在 V. Bazhanov、S. Lukyanov 和 A. Zamolodchikov 的意义上），即 Bethe 方程的任何解都与（量子）谐振子的有理扩张的谱一致。为此，在 ODE 方面，我们考虑谐振子的 Crum$-$Darboux 变换和相关的 Laguerre Wronskians，它们是由我们深入研究的分区对参数化的显着特殊函数。作为进一步的结果，在 IM 方面，我们显式地对角化量子 KdV 的前三个哈密顿算子（在自由场表示中）：本征态是 Schur 函数，本征值是分区上的平移对称函数。

我们给出了这个结果的两个应用：i）我们证明了特征值是通过评估相关怪物势极点处的牛顿对称多项式给出的，正如 V. Bazhanov、S. Lukyanov 和 A. Zamolodchikov 进一步推测的那样； ii) 我们证明这些哈密顿算子也属于通过量化经典周期性无色散 KdV 模型的第一哈密尔顿结构而获得的哈密顿算子代数。

title: Cyclic F-manifolds, distinguished connections and integrability
abstract: We show that Hertling-Manin F-manifolds provide the appropriate theoretical framework for studying the integrability of quasilinear systems of first-order evolutionary partial differential equations of the form ${\bf u}_t=X\circ {\bf u}_x$ under the mild assumption that $X$ is a cyclic vector field with respect to the F-product $\circ$. This approach is very general and allows us to treat even non-regular systems that were previously beyond the scope of existing techniques. Like in the regular case the information about integrability is contained in a torsionless connection associated with the system and the integrability condition reduces to a geometric condition involving the Riemann tensor of the connection and the structure functions of the product.
summary: 我们证明，在 $X$ 是关于 F 乘积 $\circ$ 的循环向量场的温和假设下，赫特林-马宁 F 流形为研究 ${\bf u}_t=X\circ {\bfu}_x$ 形式的一阶演化偏微分方程拟线性系统的可积性提供了适当的理论框架。这种方法非常通用，甚至允许我们处理以前超出现有技术范围的非常规系统。与常规情况一样，有关可积性的信息包含在与系统相关的无扭连接中，并且可积性条件简化为涉及连接的黎曼张量和乘积的结构函数的几何条件。

title: Compactified imaginary Toda theory
abstract: Based on the work of Guillarmou, Kupiainen, and Rhodes, we construct compactified imaginary Toda theory on closed Riemann surfaces, extending the rank-one construction to the higher-rank setting. This theory is expected to describe critical higher-rank models with extended symmetries, such as web models. We construct the correlation functions and prove that they satisfy the axioms of conformal field theory, including Segal's gluing axioms. On the Riemann sphere, we express the correlation functions as Dotsenko--Fateev type integrals. In the case $\mathfrak g=\mathfrak{sl}_n$, under a semidegenerate condition, we obtain a closed formula for the three-point structure constant.
summary: 基于 Guillarmou、Kupiainen 和 Rhodes 的工作，我们在闭 Riemann 曲面上构造了紧致虚 Toda 理论，将一阶构造扩展到更高阶的设置。该理论有望描述具有扩展对称性的关键高阶模型，例如网络模型。我们构造相关函数并证明它们满足共形场论的公理，包括​​西格尔的粘合公理。在黎曼球面上，我们将相关函数表示为Dotsenko--Fateev 型积分。在 $\mathfrak g=\mathfrak{sl}_n$ 的情况下，在半简并条件下，我们得到了三点结构常数的闭合公式。

title: Derivation of the focusing $Φ^6_1$ measure in the optimal mass regime from many-body quantum Gibbs states
abstract: We derive the focusing $\Phi^6_1$ measure on the torus $\mathbb{T}$ as the high-temperature/mean-field limit of many-body quantum Gibbs states with an attractive three-body interaction. The main difficulty in the focusing setting is to relate the classical mass cutoff to the quantum particle-number cutoff. Our result reaches the optimal mass threshold for the classical field identified by Oh, Sosoe, and Tolomeo (2022), and thereby extends the earlier work of Rout and Sohinger (2025). At the critical threshold, the short-range interaction is allowed to shrink to a Dirac delta function on a logarithmic scale in the temperature parameter. Strictly below the threshold, the same convergence holds with a polynomial dependence on the temperature. Moreover, we establish a quantum-level phase transition at the same mass threshold. The proof develops the variational framework of Lewin, Nam, and Rougerie (2015) in the focusing setting and relies on two new ingredients: a non-factorized trial state construction and a delicate tail estimate for the interacting lower symbol. These allow us to control the localization and relative entropy errors caused by the particle-number cutoff, as well as the contribution of the focusing exponential weight.
summary:
我们推导了环面 $\mathbb{T}$ 上的聚焦 $\Phi^6_1$ 测量，作为具有吸引力的三体相互作用的多体量子吉布斯态的高温/平均场极限。聚焦设置的主要困难是将经典质量截止与量子粒子数截止联系起来。我们的结果达到了 Oh、Sosoe 和 Tolomeo (2022) 确定的经典场的最佳质量阈值，从而扩展了 Rout 和 Sohinger (2025) 的早期工作。在临界阈值处，允许短程相互作用收缩到温度参数的对数尺度上的狄拉克δ函数。严格低于阈值，对于温度的多项式依赖性，同样的收敛成立。此外，我们在相同的质量阈值下建立了量子级相变。该证明在聚焦设置中发展了 Lewin、Nam 和 Rougerie（2015）的变分框架，并依赖于两个新成分：非因式分解的试验状态构造和对相互作用的下符号的精致尾部估计。

这些使我们能够控制由粒子数截止引起的定位和相对熵误差，以及聚焦指数权重的贡献。

title: Chern numbers in quantum graphs
abstract: Quantum graphs provide an analytically tractable setting for the study of Chern numbers and band degeneracies in periodic systems. We study the Chern numbers of energy bands in a two-dimensional square lattice quantum graph. We approach the problem by mapping the lattice to a single-vertex quantum graph with two loops of equal lengths pierced by magnetic fluxes. By establishing the degeneracy condition for its energy levels, we show that the model possesses two topological phases: a trivial phase, where the Chern numbers of all energy bands are $0$, and the nontrivial one, where the Chern numbers of successive energy bands alternate between $\pm1$. By applying the degeneracy condition, we calculate Chern-number phase diagrams analytically as a function of the node scattering matrix parameters and compare the results with numerical calculations.
summary: 量子图为研究周期系统中的陈数和能带简并性提供了一个易于分析处理的环境。我们研究二维方格量子图中的能带陈省数。我们通过将晶格映射到单顶点量子图来解决这个问题，该图具有两个被磁通量穿透的等长环。通过建立其能级的简并条件，我们表明该模型具有两个拓扑相：一个是平凡相，其中所有能带的陈数均为$0$，另一个是非平凡相，其中连续能带的陈数在$\pm1$之间交替。通过应用简并条件，我们解析计算陈数相图作为节点散射矩阵参数的函数，并将结果与​​数值计算进行比较。

title: Field theory of $\mathfrak{su}(n)$: the absence of non-zero scatterings
abstract: We inspect $\mathfrak{su}(n)$ forms, providing greater detail for $n=2,3$, as a toy model for a field theory in finite dimensions and with gauge symmetries. Relying on homological perturbation theory, we show that there are no scattering amplitudes with trivalent tree-level diagrams, except for the interaction vertex, thus extending a known argument of Cattaneo--Mnëv to arbitrary $n$. In contrast to this, we show how to obtain non-trivial higher products when transferring to a larger space of fields.
summary: 我们检查 $\mathfrak{su}(n)$ 形式，为 $n=2,3$ 提供更多细节，作为有限维度和规范对称性场论的玩具模型。依靠同调摄动理论，我们证明除了相互作用顶点之外，三价树级图不存在散射幅度，从而将 Cattaneo 的已知参数 - Mnëv 扩展到任意 $n$。与此相反，我们展示了如何在转移到更大的领域空间时获得不平凡的更高产品。

title: Bell State Analysis Provides an Optimal Basis Saturating the Quantum Cramer-Rao in Rotation Sensing
abstract: The second-order anti-coherent state of light is known to saturate the Cramer-Rao Bound (QCRB) for rotation sensing around an arbitrary axis. However, due to the complexity of the state and the inefficiency of state tomography, parameter extraction remains an open problem. In this manuscript, we approach the problem of parameter extraction using pair-wise Bell state analysis with an additional path degree of freedom. Due to the transformation property of rotation, only the symmetric Bell states will show up in projection in the final state. We exploit this advantage to develop a scheme for extracting the rotation angle for N=4 and N=6 second-order anti-coherent states.
summary: 已知光的二阶反相干态会使 Cramer-Rao 界 (QCRB) 饱和，用于绕任意轴的旋转传感。然而，由于状态的复杂性和状态断层扫描的低效率，参数提取仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这份手稿中，我们使用具有附加路径自由度的成对贝尔状态分析来解决参数提取问题。由于旋转的变换特性，最终状态的投影中只会出现对称的贝尔态。我们利用这一优势开发了一种提取 N=4 和 N=6 二阶反相干态旋转角的方案。

title: Quantum Sensing and Quantum Error Correction: Two Sides of the Same Coin
abstract: Quantum metrology has been making amazing progress in the past decades. It is always in researchers' interest to search for new optimal states that improve parameter estimation. In this paper, we point out a connection between the code's error correcting capacity and its ability to act as a sensor. We backed our claim by providing an example that relates the Absorption emission code to the sensor state for arbitrary state rotation. It is hoped that, in building such a unified theory, one can draw inspiration from error correction to develop promising quantum sensors.
summary: 过去几十年来，量子计量学取得了惊人的进步。寻找改进参数估计的新最佳状态始终符合研究人员的兴趣。在本文中，我们指出了代码的纠错能力与其充当传感器的能力之间的联系。我们通过提供一个示例来支持我们的主张，该示例将吸收发射代码与任意状态旋转的传感器状态相关联。希望在构建这样一个统一理论的过程中，人们能够从纠错中汲取灵感，开发出有前景的量子传感器。

title: Phase-resolved multichannel quantum escape between limit cycles
abstract: Driven-dissipative quantum systems can recover stable dynamical attractors in the semiclassical limit, including coexisting limit cycles.
