At finite fluctuation strength, this classical coexistence becomes quantum metastability: the corresponding oscillatory states undergo rare fluctuation-induced transitions. We demonstrate phase-resolved quantum escape between two such states in a driven optomechanical resonator. Unlike escape from fixed points, switching between extended attractors occurs across a periodic basin boundary and depends on the phase at which fluctuations approach it. Using quantum-jump trajectories across a controlled quantum-to-classical crossover, we reconstruct the escape geometry directly from switching events. Escape from the small-amplitude cycle proceeds through a single radial corridor and exhibits near-Arrhenius scaling, whereas escape from the large-amplitude cycle involves competing phase-localized corridors with distinct effective activation scales. The resulting curvature in the switching-rate scaling, together with event-conditioned phase distributions, identifies finite-fluctuation multichannel quantum escape between extended attractors.
summary: 驱动耗散量子系统可以在半经典极限（包括共存极限环）下恢复稳定的动态吸引子。在有限的涨落强度下，这种经典的共存变成了量子亚稳态：相应的振荡态经历罕见的涨落引起的转变。我们在驱动光机械谐振器中演示了两种此类状态之间的相位分辨量子逃逸。与从固定点逃逸不同，扩展吸引子之间的切换发生在周期性盆地边界上，并且取决于波动接近它的相位。使用跨越受控量子与经典交叉的量子跳跃轨迹，我们直接从切换事件重建逃逸几何。小振幅循环的逃逸通过单个径向走廊进行，并表现出近阿累尼乌斯尺度，而大振幅循环的逃逸则涉及具有不同有效激活尺度的竞争性相位局部走廊。开关速率缩放中产生的曲率与事件条件的相位分布一起确定了扩展吸引子之间的有限涨落多通道量子逃逸。

title: Optimal Quantum Differential Privacy via Fisher Information Spectral Analysis
abstract: The Quantum Fisher Information (QFI) metric governs a fundamental duality: it quantifies both how precisely a parameter can be estimated (metrology) and how distinguishable two quantum states are (privacy). We exploit this duality to establish a geometry-aware framework for quantum differential privacy (DP) that replaces isotropic depolarizing noise with direction-dependent noise aligned to the QFI eigenstructure of the quantum embedding. We prove six principal theorems: (1) the minimax-optimal mechanism concentrates the noise budget in the dominant QFI eigenmode, achieving $\varepsilon = (\Delta^2/2)\lambda_{\max}(1-c\gamma)$ with $O(d/\lambda_{\max})$ advantage; (2) mixed-state QFI decomposition reveals that dephasing in the adversary's basis $\textit{increases}$ accessible information, while misaligned-basis dephasing provides constructive privacy amplification from hardware noise; (3) a tight privacy $-$ utility uncertainty relation $\varepsilon \cdot (1 - F) \ge \frac{\Delta^2}{2}\frac{\operatorname{Tr}(F)}{d}$; (4) adaptive QFI estimation converging at $O(1/\sqrt{n})$ yields $1.92\times$ tighter bounds; (5) QFI-aligned composition saturates at $O(1)$ versus $O(k)$ for standard composition; and (6) hardware noise can be harnessed for privacy amplification. Adversarial vulnerabilities, Wasserstein guarantees, subspace projection, and a zero-knowledge audit protocol follow as corollaries. Results are validated on Qiskit Aer GPU simulations, IBM Quantum hardware (ibm_fez, 156 qubits), and against classical DP baselines, achieving equivalent utility at $\varepsilon \approx 0.001$ versus $\varepsilon \approx 4800$ for classical DP.
summary:
量子费希尔信息 (QFI) 度量控制着基本的二元性：它量化了参数估计的精确程度（计量学）以及两个量子态的可区分性（隐私）。我们利用这种二元性建立了一个用于量子差分隐私（DP）的几何感知框架，该框架用与量子嵌入的 QFI 特征结构对齐的方向相关噪声取代了各向同性去极化噪声。

我们证明了六个主要定理：（1）极小极大最优机制将噪声预算集中在主要的 QFI 本征模中，实现 $\varepsilon = (\Delta^2/2)\lambda_{\max}(1-c\gamma)$ 和 $O(d/\lambda_{\max})$ 优势； (2) 混合状态 QFI 分解表明，对手基础的移相 $\textit{increase}$ 可访问信息，而错位基础移相则提供了来自硬件噪声的建设性隐私放大； (3) 严格隐私 $-$ 效用不确定性关系 $\varepsilon \cdot (1 - F) \ge \frac{\Delta^2}{2}\frac{\operatorname{Tr}(F)}{d}$; (4) 自适应 QFI 估计收敛于 $O(1/\sqrt{n})$ 产生 $1.92\times$ 更严格的界限； (5) QFI 调整组合的饱和度为 $O(1)$，而标准组合的饱和度为 $O(k)$； (6)可以利用硬件噪声来增强隐私。 Wasserstein 保证，对抗性漏洞、子空间投影和零知识审计协议都是随之而来的推论。

结果在 Qiskit Aer GPU 模拟、IBM Quantum 硬件（ibm_fez，156 量子位）以及经典 DP 基线上进行了验证，在 $\varepsilon \approx 0.001$ 与经典 DP 的 $\varepsilon \approx 4800$ 下实现了等效效用。

title: Towards Scalable Quaternary Message-Passing Decoding for Quantum Error Correction
abstract: The scalability and interpretability of message-passing (MP) decoding, such as (quaternary) Belief Propagation, remain open challenges in quantum error correction. Even for surface codes, arguably the first testbed for decoding methods, studies of improved MP decoders have mostly been restricted to small distances ($d \lesssim 19$). Moreover, the mismatch with established message-passing theory limits the decoder's interpretability, making it unclear whether MP decoding can sustain its effectiveness at large system sizes. This work takes a step toward a more principled and interpretable MP decoding framework, with the goal of making MP-based decoding more reliable and bridging theory and practice. We introduce a dilution method, which allows a quaternary Min-Sum (MS) decoder to exhibit an apparent depolarizing threshold of $16\%$ up to distance $20$, outperforming Minimum-Weight Perfect Matching in finite-length regimes. Notably, for $X$-noise, the standard MS decoder under dilution has worst-case complexity $O(N \log^2 d)$ and outperforms BP-OSD at $d=65$. The observed $\sim 9\%$ threshold may correspond to a true asymptotic threshold. Finally, we give a graph-dilution argument that interprets the success of the dilution method and offers insight into when MP algorithms can genuinely scale. Taken together, these results provide encouraging progress toward scalable and interpretable MP decoding in quantum error correction.
summary:
消息传递（MP）解码（例如（四元）置信传播）的可扩展性和可解释性仍然是量子纠错中的开放挑战。即使对于表面码（可以说是解码方法的第一个测试平台），改进的 MP 解码器的研究也大多局限于小距离（$d \lesssim 19$）。此外，与已建立的消息传递理论的不匹配限制了解码器的可解释性，使得不清楚 MP 解码是否可以在大型系统规模下维持其有效性。这项工作朝着更有原则性和可解释性的 MP 解码框架迈出了一步，其目标是使基于 MP 的解码更加可靠，并架起理论和实践的桥梁。我们引入了一种稀释方法，它允许四进制最小和（MS）解码器在距离 $20$ 范围内表现出 $16\%$ 的明显去极化阈值，优于有限长度范围内的最小权重完美匹配。值得注意的是，对于 $X$ 噪声，稀释下的标准 MS 解码器的最坏情况复杂度为 $O(N \log^2 d)$，并且在 $d=65$ 时优于 BP-OSD。观察到的 $\sim 9\%$ 阈值可能对应于真正的渐近阈值。

最后，我们给出了图稀释论证，它解释了稀释方法的成功，并提供了有关 MP 算法何时可以真正扩展的见解。总而言之，这些结果为量子纠错中可扩展和可解释的 MP 解码提供了令人鼓舞的进展。

title: Detectability Limits for Intra-Block Temporal Drift in Finite-Key Entanglement-Based QKD
abstract: We study the statistical detectability of intra-block temporal drift in finite-key entanglement-based quantum key distribution, with particular relevance to E91-type parameter estimation and monitoring. Drift is modeled as a mean-preserving Lipschitz perturbation of Bernoulli observables, capturing structured temporal variation that is invisible to global-average tests. For a block of size $n$ and confidence levels $(\alpha,\beta)$, we formulate a minimax hypothesis-testing problem and define the minimal detectable amplitude. We derive matching lower and upper bounds yielding $\delta_{\min}(n,\alpha,\beta)=\Theta(n^{-1/2})$: if $n\delta^2 \to 0$, no level-$\alpha$ procedure can guarantee nontrivial uniform power over the admissible drift class, whereas a calibrated CUSUM statistic detects drift at the matching scale. Explicit constants for linear, sinusoidal, and step profiles, together with simulations, confirm the predicted scaling collapse. The result quantifies a finite-block monitoring-resolution limit and is distinct from composable security certification.
summary: 我们研究基于有限密钥纠缠的量子密钥分配中块内时间漂移的统计可检测性，特别与 E91 类型参数估计和监控相关。漂移被建模为伯努利可观测量的均值保持利普希茨扰动，捕获全局平均测试不可见的结构化时间变化。对于大小为 $n$ 和置信水平为 $(\alpha,\beta)$ 的块，我们制定一个极小极大假设检验问题并定义最小可检测幅度。我们导出匹配的下限和上限，产生 $\delta_{\min}(n,\alpha,\beta)=\Theta(n^{-1/2})$：如果 $n\delta^2 \to 0$，则没有 level-$\alpha$ 过程可以保证在允许的漂移类别上非平凡的均匀功效，而校准的 CUSUM 统计量可以检测匹配范围内的漂移。线性、正弦曲线和阶梯曲线的显式常数以及模拟，证实了预测的缩放崩溃。结果量化了有限块监控分辨率限制，并且与可组合安全认证不同。

title: A Matched Spectral Benchmark of Quantum Inspired Feature Maps
abstract: Quantum machine learning is often motivated by the idea that quantum systems can expose useful high-dimensional structure that is difficult to access with classical models. We isolate one central component of this claim: the fixed data-encoding map. Amplitude, angle, and basis encoding are evaluated as deterministic feature maps for classical supervised learning under matched output dimensionality and strong classical controls. The benchmark compares these encodings against raw linear models, random Fourier features, polynomial features, PCA, RBF SVMs, and shallow neural networks across diverse classical datasets. Rather than treating performance as a single endpoint, we analyze the geometry of each representation through effective rank, condition number, centered kernel alignment, predictive performance, and practical overhead. The resulting picture is mechanistic: amplitude encoding can remove magnitude information through unit-sphere normalization, angle encoding can become geometrically redundant with raw linear features, and basis encoding can impose a binary Hamming geometry that is poorly aligned with smooth decision structure. These findings do not argue against quantum computation, however, they show that fixed quantum-inspired encoding geometry alone is not a reliable source of machine-learning advantage on classical data.
summary:
量子机器学习的动机通常是这样的：量子系统可以揭示经典模型难以访问的有用的高维结构。我们分离出这一主张的一个核心组成部分：固定数据编码映射。在匹配的输出维度和强经典控制下，将幅度、角度和基础编码评估为经典监督学习的确定性特征图。该基准测试将这些编码与原始线性模型、随机傅立叶特征、多项式特征、PCA、RBF SVM 和跨不同经典数据集的浅层神经网络进行比较。我们没有将性能视为单个端点，而是通过有效排名、条件数、居中内核对齐、预测性能和实际开销来分析每个表示的几何形状。由此产生的图像是机械的：幅度编码可以通过单位球归一化去除幅度信息，角度编码可以在原始线性特征上变得几何冗余，而基础编码可以强加与平滑决策结构对齐不良的二进制汉明几何。

这些发现并不反对量子计算，然而，它们表明，仅固定的量子启发编码几何并不是经典数据上机器学习优势的可靠来源。

title: Local Impurity Induced Growth and Scrambling in Clean Free Fermions
abstract: We study impurity-induced particle growth and scrambling in clean one-dimensional free-fermion systems. We show that a single local impurity can act as a branching source: particle or operator weight propagates coherently into the free bulk, returns to the impurity, and is locally converted into additional degrees of freedom. We develop this branching picture in three complementary settings: a monitored free-fermion model with feedback, a fully unitary interacting particle model, and Heisenberg operator dynamics with an interacting impurity. In the monitored model, we find a feedback-driven transition for both boundary and bulk impurities. In the unitary particle and operator models, a boundary impurity gives rise to an analogous transition from saturation to sustained growth and scrambling. These results reveal how a single impurity can generate complex many-body dynamics in an otherwise clean and free quantum system.
summary: 我们研究干净的一维自由费米子系统中杂质引起的粒子生长和扰乱。我们证明，单个局部杂质可以充当分支源：粒子或算子权重一致地传播到自由体积中，返回到杂质，并局部转换为附加自由度。我们在三个互补的设置中开发了这个分支图：带反馈的受监控自由费米子模型、完全统一的相互作用粒子模型以及具有相互作用杂质的海森堡算子动力学。在监测模型中，我们发现边界杂质和块体杂质均存在反馈驱动的转变。在酉粒子和算子模型中，边界杂质会引起从饱和到持续增长和扰乱的类似转变。这些结果揭示了单一杂质如何在干净且自由的量子系统中产生复杂的多体动力学。

title: Multiple fidelities and joint numerical range
abstract: We investigate the effectiveness of entanglement detection based on multiple fidelities via the geometry of the joint separable numerical range. When all reference states are product states, we derive a necessary and sufficient criterion for such detection: either some pair of reference states has nontrivial moduli of the local inner products on both subsystems, or the orthogonal complement of the span of the reference states is completely entangled. We further show that there exist sets of reference product states for which no proper subset is effective for entanglement detection, whereas the full set is. A typical example of this phenomenon is provided by unextendible product bases. Moreover, for a pair of reference product states on a bipartite system with arbitrary local dimensions, we characterize both the joint numerical range and the joint separable numerical range, showing that the joint separable numerical range is determined solely by their local fidelities, as illustrated by a representative two-qubit example. Our results offer a systematic approach to designing effective entanglement witnesses and lay the groundwork for extensions to higher-dimensional and multipartite scenarios.
summary:
我们通过联合可分离数值范围的几何形状研究基于多重保真度的纠缠检测的有效性。当所有参考状态都是乘积状态时，我们得出这种检测的充分必要条件：要么某对参考状态在两个子系统上具有非平凡的局部内积模，要么参考状态跨度的正交补完全纠缠。我们进一步表明，存在一组参考产品状态，其中没有合适的子集对纠缠检测有效，而完整的集合是有效的。这种现象的一个典型例子是不可扩展的产品基础。此外，对于具有任意局部维度的二分系统上的一对参考乘积状态，我们描述了联合数值范围和联合可分离数值范围，表明联合可分离数值范围仅由它们的局部保真度决定，如代表性的双量子位示例所示。

我们的结果提供了一种系统方法来设计有效的纠缠见证，并为扩展到更高维度和多方场景奠定了基础。

title: Semiclassical Propagation and the Dynamics of Configuration Space
abstract: This work explores the non-relativistic quantum propagator $K(x,t)$ as a solution of the Schrödinger equation. We suppose that the propagator takes the form ${\rm exp}\left(\frac{\mathrm{i}}{\hbar}S+R\right)$, generalizing the usual WKB ansatz by allowing an additive exponent $R$ whose role as a measure of quantumness is investigated. Since $S$ is subject to the assumption that it is a solution of the Hamilton-Jacobi equation, here we are further interested in the role of $R$ and its interpretation as a measure of quantumness. Several systems are studied as concrete examples to illustrate this approach. Furthermore, a proposal to generalize it for fields is put forward. This is tested for some simple systems. Finally, the possibilities to use this approach for the case of systems whose dynamics are controlled by the Hamiltonian constraint are analyzed.
summary: 这项工作探索非相对论量子传播器 $K(x,t)$ 作为薛定谔方程的解。我们假设传播器采用 ${\rm exp}\left(\frac{\mathrm{i}}{\hbar}S+R\right)$ 的形式，通过允许加法指数 $R$ 来推广通常的 WKB ansatz，研究其作为量子性度量的作用。由于 $S$ 的假设是它是 Hamilton-Jacobi 方程的解，因此我们在这里进一步对 $R$ 的作用及其作为量子性度量的解释感兴趣。研究了几个系统作为具体示例来说明这种方法。此外，还提出了将其推广到各个领域的建议。这是针对一些简单系统进行测试的。最后，分析了在动力学受哈密顿约束控制的系统情况下使用这种方法的可能性。

title: Quantum Dynamics of Interacting dissipative oscillators: A novel scheme
abstract: We investigate the dynamics of interacting quantum harmonic oscillators coupled to thermal reservoirs under the influence of an external driving field. In a novel theoretical scheme, we first analyze the case of two interacting oscillators, each coupled to its own thermal reservoir, with an external source applied to the first oscillator. By diagonalizing the total Hamiltonian through successive Bogoliubov transformations, we obtain explicit expressions for the oscillator energies. A key finding is that off resonance, the energy of the second oscillator grows unboundedly, whereas on resonance, it remains bounded and periodic. We then derive the Husimi functions for both oscillators and the reduced Husimi functions for initially separable coherent and number states. The shift of the Husimi function's maximum away from the origin at zero temperature confirms continuous energy gain under specific parameter conditions. An explicit formula for the reduced density matrix components in the number state basis is also provided. Finally, we generalize the model to $n$ interacting oscillators in a thermal medium driven by a classical field. For the three-oscillator case, we show that on resonance, the energies of the first and third oscillators grow, while the energy of the second oscillator remains periodically bounded. These results offer insights into energy transfer and localization in coupled oscillator systems in thermal environments.
summary:
我们研究了在外部驱动场的影响下与储热库耦合的相互作用的量子谐振子的动力学。在一种新颖的理论方案中，我们首先分析两个相互作用的振荡器的情况，每个振荡器都耦合到自己的储热库，并将外部源应用于第一个振荡器。通过连续的 Bogoliubov 变换对总哈密顿量进行对角化，我们获得了振荡器能量的显式表达式。一个重要的发现是，在非共振状态下，第二个振荡器的能量无限增长，而在共振状态下，它仍然是有界和周期性的。然后，我们推导出两个振荡器的 Husimi 函数以及初始可分离相干态和数态的简化 Husimi 函数。 Husimi 函数最大值在零温度下偏离原点的变化证实了特定参数条件下的连续能量增益。还提供了数状态基础上简化密度矩阵分量的显式公式。最后，我们将该模型推广到由经典场驱动的热介质中的 $n$ 相互作用振荡器。

对于三振荡器的情况，我们表明，在谐振时，第一和第三振荡器的能量增长，而第二振荡器的能量保持周期性限制。这些结果为热环境中耦合振荡器系统的能量传递和定位提供了见解。

title: Electrodynamics as a Theory of Persistent Stochastic Processes
abstract: A process-theoretic approach to electrodynamics based on persistent Kac-type stochastic processes is developed. Finite-velocity stochastic propagation is taken as primary, while relativistic wave equations arise as emergent descriptions after analytic continuation of Telegrapher-type dynamics. The Dirac and Maxwell equations are interpreted as arising from closely related persistent propagation structures differing only in spin representation. The framework is not intended to modify the successful empirical predictions of quantum electrodynamics, but to provide a different underlying ontology. Particles and fields are not treated as primitive entities with fixed intrinsic properties. Instead, relativistic particle and field structures emerge as stable collective modes of coupled persistent stochastic dynamics. Mass and charge acquire interpretations respectively as persistence and stochastic coupling scales. Stationary bound states are interpreted as metastable persistent stochastic modes with nontrivial internal sector dynamics. Spontaneous emission is viewed as stochastic destabilization of such modes, while stimulated emission arises through resonant synchronization of persistent transition currents by incident radiation. Gauge interactions are introduced at the level of propagation-sector amplitudes prior to the emergence of observable probabilities. Radiative effects, including the anomalous magnetic moment of the electron, are interpreted as effective stochastic dressing of coupled matter--radiation processes. Some comments on gauge symmetry, equilibration and the Standard Model are also included.
summary:
开发了一种基于持续 Kac 型随机过程的电动力学过程理论方法。有限速度随机传播被认为是主要的，而相对论波动方程则作为电报员型动力学的解析延拓后的新兴描述而出现。狄拉克和麦克斯韦方程被解释为由密切相关的持续传播结构产生，仅在自旋表示方面有所不同。该框架并不是为了修改量子电动力学的成功经验预测，而是为了提供不同的基础本体论。粒子和场不被视为具有固定内在属性的原始实体。相反，相对论粒子和场结构作为耦合持久随机动力学的稳定集体模式而出现。质量和电荷分别被解释为持久性和随机耦合尺度。固定束缚态被解释为具有非平凡内部扇区动力学的亚稳态持续随机模式。

自发发射被视为此类模式的随机不稳定，而受激发射是通过入射辐射对持续跃迁电流的谐振同步而产生的。在可观测概率出现之前，在传播扇区振幅水平上引入了规范相互作用。辐射效应，包括电子的反常磁矩，被解释为耦合物质辐射过程的有效随机修饰。还包括一些关于规范对称性、平衡性和标准模型的评论。

title: On Constructing and Decoding Quantum Triorthogonal Codes
abstract: A triorthogonal code is a binary quantum Calderbank-Shor-Steane (CSS) code defined by a triorthogonal matrix. Triorthogonal codes are a key ingredient in magic-state distillation, since they allow for transversal $\mathsf{T}$ gates, a non-Clifford logical operation useful for achieving universal fault-tolerant quantum computation. Their construction is challenging because it must satisfy simultaneous pairwise and triple-wise overlap constraints, as well as row-weight requirements. In this work, we study the construction and decoding of triorthogonal codes with prescribed dual-distance properties. We derive an existence criterion for even-weight triorthogonal generator matrices with a target dual minimum distance. The criterion combines triorthogonality constraints with MacWilliams identities via Krawtchouk-polynomial conditions on the dual weight distribution, yielding an integer linear programming formulation for the construction problem. We find new nontrivial triorthogonal codes that are not necessarily generated by classical triply-even codes. The decoding performance of high-distance triorthogonal codes obtained via the doubling construction is then evaluated over the dephasing channel. We compare bounded-distance decoding, belief propagation plus ordered-statistics post-processing, and a GRAND-based decoder adapted to the quantum setting, which turns out to be a promising option.
summary:
三正交码是由三正交矩阵定义的二进制量子 Calderbank-Shor-Steane (CSS) 码。三正交码是魔态蒸馏的关键成分，因为它们允许横向 $\mathsf{T}$ 门，这是一种非 Clifford 逻辑运算，可用于实现通用容错量子计算。它们的构造具有挑战性，因为它必须同时满足成对和三重重叠约束以及行重要求。在这项工作中，我们研究了具有规定双距离特性的三正交码的构造和解码。我们推导了具有目标对偶最小距离的偶权三正交生成矩阵的存在准则。该准则通过对偶权重分布上的 Krawtchouk 多项式条件将三正交约束与 MacWilliams 恒等式相结合，产生构造问题的整数线性规划公式。我们发现了新的非平凡的三正交码，它们不一定是由经典的三偶码生成的。

然后在相移信道上评估通过加倍构造获得的长距离三正交码的解码性能。我们比较了有界距离解码、置信传播加有序统计后处理以及适应量子设置的基于 GRAND 的解码器，事实证明这是一个有前途的选择。

title: Algebraic Tomography of Non-Hermitian Floquet Systems from Observable Traces
abstract: We formulate a framework of Floquet algebraic tomography for finite-dimensional non-Hermitian monodromy matrices from observable trace sequences $\zeta_n^{(O)}={\rm Tr}(OM^n)$. Since these sequences are constrained by the characteristic polynomial of $M$, the inverse problem is a finite-dimensional algebraic reconstruction problem rather than a generic exponential fit. We organize the reconstruction through the observable resolvent, spectral determinant, and Dirichlet spectral data, separating the common spectral skeleton from observable-dependent dressing. Cayley--Hamilton and Hankel methods recover the similarity-invariant spectral data, while multi-observable and Liouville-space extensions connect the construction to realization theory and tomography reconstruction. We further clarify the limits of identifiability from restricted observable algebras: the data determine a visible representative, micromotion can enlarge the sampled visible operator space, and exact symmetries impose residual invisible sectors. Two examples, a driven transmon qutrit and a finite non-Hermitian Floquet SSH chain, demonstrate leakage-induced visibility expansion, observable-dependent phase response, EP-accessible branch geometry, and disorder/probe-dependent observable-dimension readouts.
summary:
我们根据可观测轨迹序列 $\zeta_n^{(O)}={\rm Tr}(OM^n)$ 制定了有限维非厄米单向矩阵的 Floquet 代数层析成像框架。由于这些序列受到 $M$ 特征多项式的约束，因此反问题是有限维代数重构问题，而不是一般的指数拟合问题。我们通过可观测解析、光谱行列式和狄利克雷光谱数据来组织重建，将公共光谱骨架与可观测相关的修饰分开。 Cayley-Hamilton 和 Hankel 方法恢复了相似性不变的光谱数据，而多可观测和刘维尔空间扩展将构造与实现理论和断层扫描重建连接起来。我们进一步阐明了受限制的可观察代数的可识别性的局限性：数据确定了可见的代表，微运动可以扩大采样的可见算子空间，并且精确的对称性强加了残留的不可见扇区。

两个示例（驱动 transmon qutrit 和有限非 Hermitian Floquet SSH 链）演示了泄漏引起的可见性扩展、可观测相关相位响应、EP 可访问分支几何结构以及无序/探针相关可观测维度读数。

title: Geometric phases of reduced states in the transverse-field Ising chain
abstract: Geometric phases have been extensively investigated in a wide range of quantum systems, often revealing deep connections to the underlying topology of many-body states. In this work, we examine two geometric phases defined for mixed quantum states$-$the interferometric geometric phase and the Uhlmann phase$-$extracted from two-site reduced density matrices of the transverse-field Ising model with nearest-neighbor interacting spins. By applying coordinated local unitary rotations to the spins, we compute the geometric phases associated with the two-site states across the critical point. We find that the interferometric phase is a more reliable indicator of the quantum phase transition in this model than the Uhlmann phase.
summary: 几何相位在各种量子系统中得到了广泛的研究，通常揭示了与多体态的基础拓扑的深层联系。在这项工作中，我们研究了为混合量子态定义的两个几何相位$-$干涉几何相位和乌尔曼相位$-$从具有最近邻相互作用自旋的横向场伊辛模型的两点约化密度矩阵中提取。通过对自旋应用协调的局部酉旋转，我们计算与跨临界点的两点状态相关的几何相位。我们发现干涉相是该模型中比乌尔曼相更可靠的量子相变指标。

title: Improved Dual Attack and Trapdoor Sampling via Quantum Rejection Sampling
abstract: In this work, we revisit the dual attack and GPV trapdoor sampling, focusing on the lattice Gaussian sampling term, which can be a significant bottleneck in the overall complexity. We show that this sampling step can be quantumly accelerated by combining the lower bound underlying Wang and Ling's analysis of Klein's algorithm with the quantum rejection sampling (QRS) framework proposed by Ozols et al. Specifically, this lower bound gives precisely the pointwise domination condition required for quantum rejection sampling when given coherent oracle access to a truncated Klein proposal distribution, which yields a quantum procedure for preparing the truncated dual $q$-ary lattice Gaussian with a quadratic reduction in the sampling complexity. The truncation radius is chosen so that the truncated distribution is negligibly close to the full lattice Gaussian in total variation distance. Substituting this sampler into the dual attack framework results in reduced overall attack-cost estimates. Compared with Pouly and Shen's modern dual attack under the same parameter choices, our estimates reduce the attack cost by \(9\), \(4\), and \(13\) bits for Kyber-512, Kyber-768, and Kyber-1024, respectively. We also report the corresponding estimates with modulus switching. Finally, by replacing the Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) sampler with the QRS algorithm, we achieve a similar quadratic speedup in the GPV signing process.
summary:
在这项工作中，我们重新审视双重攻击和 GPV 陷门采样，重点关注格子高斯采样项，这可能是整体复杂性的一个重要瓶颈。我们证明，通过将 Wang 和 Ling 对 Klein 算法的分析的下界与 Ozols 等人提出的量子拒绝采样 (QRS) 框架相结合，可以量子加速该采样步骤。具体来说，当给定相干预言机访问截断的克莱因提议分布时，这个下界精确地给出了量子拒绝采样所需的逐点支配条件，这产生了一个用于准备截断双 $q$-ary 晶格高斯的量子程序，并且采样复杂度呈二次降低。选择截断半径，使得截断分布在总变化距离上可忽略不计地接近全晶格高斯分布。将此采样器替换为双重攻击框架会降低总体攻击成本估计。

与 Pouly 和 Shen 在相同参数选择下的现代双重攻击相比，我们估计 Kyber-512、Kyber-768 和 Kyber-1024 的攻击成本分别降低了 \(9\)、\(4\) 和 \(13\) 位。我们还报告了模数切换的相应估计。最后，通过用 QRS 算法替换马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 采样器，我们在 GPV 签名过程中实现了类似的二次加速。

title: Singularizing preserving countable additivity quantum channels on quantum measurable cardinals
abstract: We investigate the structural and dynamical properties of a class of quantum channels on von Neumann algebras induced by averaging over operator groups via the Pettis integral. Utilizing the classical Yosida--Hewitt decomposition, we focus on the interplay between the set-theoretic properties of the underlying space and the topological nature of the resulting quantum states. We establish a suffucient condition under which a channel preserves $\sigma$-additivity and exhibits a singularizing property, completely suppressing the normal component of any incoming state. In conjunction with the theory of Ulam real-valued measurable cardinals, this framework reveals a novel phenomenon: the existence of quantum channels that transform normal states into singular yet strictly $\sigma$-additive states. Furthermore, we analyze the structural constraints on the preservation of state purity imposed by the cardinality of the continuum, and extend our constructions to invariant measures on groups and their unitary representations, establishing the convergence of their Cesàro averages in the strong operator topology.
summary: 我们研究了冯·诺依曼代数上一类量子通道的结构和动力学特性，这些量子通道是通过佩蒂斯积分对算子组进行平均而得出的。利用经典的 Yosida-Hewitt 分解，我们关注基础空间的集合论属性与所得量子态的拓扑性质之间的相互作用。我们建立了一个充分条件，在该条件下通道保留 $\sigma$-可加性并表现出奇异性，完全抑制任何输入状态的法向分量。结合乌拉姆实值可测基数理论，该框架揭示了一个新现象：存在将正常态转化为奇异但严格$\sigma$可加态的量子通道。此外，我们分析了连续体基数对保持状态纯度的结构约束，并将我们的构造扩展到群及其酉表示的不变测度，建立强算子拓扑中塞萨罗平均值的收敛性。

title: Nonreciprocal Landau-Zener Tunneling in the Presence of Heat-Bath-Induced Colored Noise
abstract: In this work, we investigate the effects of heat-bath-induced colored noise on nonreciprocal Landau-Zener tunneling. We perform numerical calculations of the instantaneous energy levels and find that noise induces stochastic fluctuations in these levels. Beyond such fluctuations, sufficiently large nonreciprocity parameters enable noise to further trigger the emergence of multiple exceptional points. The corresponding tunneling probability is significantly modified by colored noise. On the one hand, colored noise generally enhances the tunneling probability under nonadiabatic sweeping. On the other hand, it can break the reciprocity of Landau-Zener tunneling in the adiabatic limit. In particular, for large nonreciprocity parameters, the adiabatic tunneling probability is insensitive to noise and determined by exceptional points. We plot the phase diagram of tunneling probability as a function of the sweep rate and nonreciprocity parameter, for different amplitudes and correlation times of colored noise. Analytically, we derive the exact expression for the tunneling probability in the absence of noise and an approximate solution in the white-noise limit, employing Weber functions and the Wiener-Hermite expansion method. Some implications of our theory are discussed.
summary:
在这项工作中，我们研究了热浴引起的有色噪声对不可逆朗道-齐纳隧道效应的影响。我们对瞬时能级进行数值计算，发现噪声会引起这些能级的随机波动。除了这种波动之外，足够大的非互易参数使噪声进一步触发多个异常点的出现。有色噪声显着改变了相应的隧道概率。一方面，有色噪声通常会提高非绝热扫描下的隧道概率。另一方面，它可以打破绝热极限下的Landau-Zener隧道互易性。特别是，对于大的非互易性参数，绝热隧道概率对噪声不敏感并且由异常点确定。对于有色噪声的不同幅度和相关时间，我们绘制了隧道概率的相图，作为扫描速率和非互易参数的函数。

通过分析，我们采用韦伯函数和维纳-埃尔米特展开法，推导出无噪声情况下隧道概率的精确表达式以及白噪声极限下的近似解。讨论了我们理论的一些含义。

title: Dissipative preparation of injective tensor network states
abstract: The preparation of tensor network states is a fundamental prerequisite for a wide range of quantum simulation tasks. While many unitary protocols for preparing these states have been investigated, dissipative state preparation provides a powerful alternative since it can be robust to noise and initialization errors. In this paper, we construct both continuous-time and discrete-time geometrically local dissipative processes whose unique steady state is a given injective tensor network state. Our method prepares all injective matrix product states on $N$ sites to an error $\varepsilon$ in $O(\log (N/\varepsilon))$ time, yielding an exponential improvement over previously known dissipative preparation schemes. For two and higher-dimensional tensor network states, we prove that when the tensors of the state are \emph{highly injective}, the constructed dissipative processes are rapid-mixing i.e., they prepare a state $\varepsilon$-close to the $N$-site target state in $O( \log (N/\varepsilon))$ time. For these states, our approach provides a polynomial speedup over known unitary methods for states defined on lattices and an exponential speedup for states on general bounded-degree graphs. We corroborate our theoretical results with numerical studies that indicate that the dissipative protocol can rapidly prepares states outside the high-injectivity assumption.
summary:
张量网络状态的准备是各种量子模拟任务的基本先决条件。虽然已经研究了许多用于准备这些状态的统一协议，但耗散状态准备提供了一种强大的替代方案，因为它对噪声和初始化错误具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们构造了连续时间和离散时间几何局部耗散过程，其唯一稳态是给定的单射张量网络状态。我们的方法在 $O(\log (N/\varepsilon))$ 时间内将 $N$ 站点上的所有单射矩阵乘积状态准备到错误 $\varepsilon$，与之前已知的耗散准备方案相比，得到了指数级的改进。对于二维及更高维的张量网络状态，我们证明当状态的张量为\emph{高度单射}时，构造的耗散过程是快速混合的，即，它们在$O(\log(N/\varepsilon))$时间内准备一个状态$\varepsilon$-接近$N$位点目标状态。

对于这些状态，我们的方法为格上定义的状态提供了比已知酉方法更高的多项式加速，并为一般有界度图上的状态提供了指数加速。我们通过数值研究证实了我们的理论结果，表明耗散协议可以快速准备高注入性假设之外的状态。

title: Extracting Universal Entanglement Scaling from Mixed Fermionic Gaussian States via Entanglement Projected Entropy
abstract: Identifying spatial quantum correlations in mixed states is challenging because thermal mixed-state contributions obscure the entanglement encoded in subsystem entropy. Here, we introduce the entanglement projected entropy, a diagnostic for extracting boundary-sensitive quantum correlations from mixed fermionic Gaussian states. By resolving subsystem entropy into Gaussian entanglement channels and projecting their purification partners onto the physical complement, we obtain a closed-form expression in terms of the physical covariance matrix. In a one-dimensional free-fermion chain, it removes the volume-law mixed-state background and recovers the zero-temperature conformal scaling with the $c/3$ coefficient. In a two-dimensional half-filled $\pi$-flux model, it reveals a universal finite-temperature scaling collapse governed by an effective Dirac infrared length. These results establish entanglement projected entropy as a Gaussian spatial filter for boundary-sensitive quantum correlations hidden in mixed-state entropy.
summary: 识别混合态中的空间量子相关性具有挑战性，因为热混合态的贡献掩盖了子系统熵中编码的纠缠。在这里，我们引入了纠缠投影熵，这是一种从混合费米子高斯态中提取边界敏感量子相关性的诊断方法。通过将子系统熵解析为高斯纠缠通道并将其纯化伙伴投影到物理补上，我们获得了物理协方差矩阵的闭合形式表达式。在一维自由费米子链中，它消除了体积定律混合态背景并恢复了具有 $c/3$ 系数的零温度共形标度。在二维半填充$\pi$-通量模型中，它揭示了由有效狄拉克红外长度控制的通用有限温度尺度塌缩。这些结果将纠缠投影熵建立为高斯空间滤波器，用于隐藏在混合状态熵中的边界敏感量子相关性。

title: A framework for the benchmarking of transport-induced excitations in shuttling-based ion-trap quantum processors
abstract: We develop a theoretical and numerical framework to analyze the effect of transport on the motional states of ions in a trapped-ion quantum processor. We decompose the shuttling protocol into primitive operations and characterize these in terms of their heating performance. Instead of having to simulate the whole transport protocol for each complete ion trajectory, the method allows us to determine the heating properties of each primitive operation separately and obtain the global result through an algebraic expression. We demonstrate our method by applying it to an 8-qubit quantum processor design based on linear transport and swap operations for all-to-all connectivity. We show how to incorporate the price of motional operations at the level of the compiler as a cost function.
summary: 我们开发了一个理论和数值框架来分析离子捕获量子处理器中传输对离子运动状态的影响。我们将穿梭协议分解为原始操作，并根据其加热性能来表征这些操作。该方法无需模拟每个完整离子轨迹的整个传输协议，而是允许我们分别确定每个原始操作的加热属性，并通过代数表达式获得全局结果。我们通过将我们的方法应用于基于线性传输和交换操作的 8 量子位量子处理器设计来演示我们的方法，以实现所有到所有的连接。我们展示了如何将编译器级别的运动操作的代价合并为成本函数。

title: Causal Order Cannot Be An Observable
abstract: Recent developments in the formalisation of quantum causal structures have made it possible to test and compare hypotheses about causal structure empirically, rather than being a-priori assumptions. Such differences in causal structure may be leveraged to distinguish between the processes they belong to, akin to distinguishing between quantum states known to belong to different eigenspaces of an observable. So how far this analogy can be pushed? Can causal order be interpreted as a kind of observable? Can it be measured? To this end we construct a completely operational definition of observables in terms of `discrimination tasks'. This begins with some base set of classes (analogous to a quantum observable's eigenspaces) before we impose three conditions on how these classes relate under discrimination tasks. These conditions recover the properties of a standard observable, letting us apply this definition to non-state entities such as quantum processes, which naturally encode causal structure. These conditions can be described in plain language as (1) `members of any class are perfectly distinguishable from members of any other' (i.e. our classes are `sharp'), (2) `entities perfectly distinguishable pairwise are all perfectly distinguishable by a joint intervention', and (3) `if all members of a class are perfectly distinguishable from an entity, then the whole class is perfectly distinguishable from it jointly'. By analysing classes of quantum processes having strict causal orders, we find causal classes which are sharp but violate condition 2, and classes which violate condition 3. This implies that causal order cannot be an observable. We note cases in the literature which claim to prove the opposite, and discuss them. We find their analyses presume special circumstances equivalent to conditions (2) and (3), and so do not contradict our own findings.
summary:
量子因果结构形式化的最新进展使得凭经验测试和比较有关因果结构的假设成为可能，而不是先验假设。因果结构的这种差异可以用来区分它们所属的过程，类似于区分已知属于可观察到的不同本征空间的量子态。那么这个类比可以推到什么程度呢？因果顺序可以解释为一种可观察的吗？可以测量吗？为此，我们根据“歧视任务”构建了一个完全可操作的可观察量定义。这从一些基本类集（类似于量子可观察的特征空间）开始，然后我们对这些类在判别任务下如何关联施加三个条件。这些条件恢复了标准可观察量的属性，使我们可以将此定义应用于非状态实体，例如量子过程，它自然地编码因果结构。这些条件可以用简单的语言描述为（1）“任何类别的成员都可以与任何其他类别的成员完全区分开来”（即

我们的类是“尖锐的”），（2）“成对完全可区分的实体都可以通过联合干预完全区分”，以及（3）“如果一个类的所有成员都可以与一个实体完全区分，那么整个类可以共同与该实体完全区分”。通过分析具有严格因果顺序的量子过程类，我们发现因果类是尖锐但违反条件 2 的，以及违反条件 3 的类。这意味着因果顺序不能是可观察的。我们注意到文献中声称证明相反的案例，并对其进行讨论。我们发现他们的分析假设了相当于条件（2）和（3）的特殊情况，因此与我们自己的发现并不矛盾。

title: Unsupervised learning for the systematic identification of nondispersive wave packets in driven helium
abstract: Nondispersive wave packets in driven helium are long-lived quantum states that follow classical resonant orbits without spreading. Their identification typically requires detailed analysis of phase-space structures and extensive exploration of parameter regimes. In this work, we introduce an unsupervised learning approach to automate the identification of physically relevant states in the driven helium atom. Using a Floquet-based description, quantum states are computed and represented as probability distributions in configuration and phase space, which serve as input to a convolutional neural network that constructs a low-dimensional embedding of the data. Clustering in the embedding space reveals distinct classes of quantum states. By combining geometric analysis, physical parameter inspection, and time-evolution studies, we identify clusters corresponding to frozen planet states and nondispersive wave packets. The method successfully recovers known NDWP regimes without prior labeling, demonstrating that the learned representation captures physically meaningful structures in a systematic and automated manner. These results establish unsupervised representation learning as an effective tool for the systematic analysis of complex quantum datasets.
summary:
驱动氦中的非色散波包是长寿命的量子态，遵循经典共振轨道而不扩散。它们的识别通常需要对相空间结构进行详细分析并对参数范围进行广泛探索。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种无监督学习方法来自动识别驱动氦原子中的物理相关状态。使用基于 Floquet 的描述，计算量子态并将其表示为配置和相空间中的概率分布，作为构造数据低维嵌入的卷积神经网络的输入。嵌入空间中的聚类揭示了不同类别的量子态。通过结合几何分析、物理参数检查和时间演化研究，我们识别了与冻结行星状态和非色散波包相对应的簇。该方法在没有事先标记的情况下成功恢复了已知的 NDWP 状态，表明学习的表示以系统和自动化的方式捕获了物理上有意义的结构。

这些结果确立了无监督表示学习作为复杂量子数据集系统分析的有效工具。

title: Beyond Logical Circuits: Hardware-Aware Analysis of Expressibility and Trainability in Variational Quantum Algorithms
abstract: Variational quantum algorithms (VQAs) rely on parameterized quantum circuits (PQCs), whose performance is governed by expressibility and trainability. Existing studies typically evaluate these properties at the logical circuit level, implicitly assuming that designed PQCs remain unchanged during hardware execution. In practice, however, hardware-aware transpilation modifies circuit structure through qubit mapping, routing, and basis decomposition, potentially altering PQC behavior. In this paper, we perform a systematic hardware-aware analysis of expressibility and trainability by comparing logical and transpiled PQCs across multiple ansatz families, qubit counts, and circuit depths. Expressibility is measured using fidelity-based KL divergence, while trainability is quantified through gradient variance. Our results show that transpilation acts as an implicit architectural perturbation, producing strongly ansatz-dependent effects. Expressibility deviations exceed upto 125% in some cases, while trainability variations reach up to 25%. Structured ansatzes are generally more robust, whereas highly entangled architectures are more sensitive to transpilation-induced transformations. We further show that transpilation can alter the commonly assumed expressibility-trainability trade-off, demonstrating that logical-level analyses may not reliably predict hardware-level behavior. These findings highlight the importance of hardware-aware evaluation for accurate characterization of VQAs.
summary:
变分量子算法 (VQA) 依赖于参数化量子电路 (PQC)，其性能由可表达性和可训练性决定。现有研究通常在逻辑电路级别评估这些属性，隐含地假设设计的 PQC 在硬件执行期间保持不变。然而，在实践中，硬件感知转译通过量子位映射、路由和基础分解来修改电路结构，从而可能改变 PQC 行为。在本文中，我们通过比较多个 ansatz 系列的逻辑和转译 PQC、量子位计数和电路深度，对可表达性和可训练性进行系统的硬件感知分析。可表达性是使用基于保真度的 KL 散度来衡量的，而可训练性是通过梯度方差来量化的。我们的结果表明，转译作为一种隐式的结构扰动，产生强烈依赖于 ansatz 的效应。在某些情况下，表达性偏差高达 125%，而可训练性偏差高达 25%。结构化的结构通常更稳健，而高度纠缠的结构对转译引起的转换更敏感。

我们进一步表明，转译可以改变通常假设的可表达性与可训练性的权衡，证明逻辑级分析可能无法可靠地预测硬件级行为。这些发现强调了硬件感知评估对于准确表征 VQA 的重要性。

title: High fidelity preservation of photonic hyperentanglement in a free-space optical delay line
abstract: Photonic hyperentanglement enables increased information capacity and enhanced functionality for quantum communication and networking. However, synchronization of hyperentangled photon pairs requires maintaining correlations simultaneously across multiple degrees of freedom (DOFs). The preservation of polarization and energy-time entanglement in hyperentangled photon pairs is demonstrated using a free-space optical delay line based on nested Herriott cells. After a delay of 647 ns, a two-photon interference visibility of 93.9(3)% is observed in the energy-time DOF, while a CHSH parameter of 2.758(5) is obtained in the polarization DOF. These results confirm that entanglement correlations in both DOFs are preserved after propagation through the delay line. They demonstrate that free-space optical delay lines are compatible with complex photonic quantum states and provide a promising route toward delay-based memories for synchronization and multiplexing in quantum networks.
summary: 光子超纠缠可以增加信息容量并增强量子通信和网络的功能。然而，超纠缠光子对的同步需要在多个自由度 (DOF) 上同时保持相关性。使用基于嵌套赫里奥特盒的自由空间光学延迟线证明了超纠缠光子对中偏振和能量时间纠缠的保留。延迟647 ns后，在能量时间自由度中观察到双光子干涉可见度为93.9(3)%，而在偏振自由度中获得2.758(5)的CHSH参数。这些结果证实，两个自由度中的纠缠相关性在通过延迟线传播后得以保留。他们证明自由空间光学延迟线与复杂的光子量子态兼容，并为量子网络中用于同步和复用的基于延迟的存储器提供了一条有前途的途径。

title: Dissipative Time Quasicrystals from Multilevel Interference
abstract: Boundary time crystals exhibit spontaneous breaking of continuous time-translation symmetry through persistent periodic oscillations in driven-dissipative many-body systems. Here, we show that multilevel interference provides a natural route beyond periodic order, enabling dissipative time quasicrystals without externally imposed quasiperiodic driving. We consider a collectively driven-dissipative four-level ensemble with two degenerate excited states and two degenerate ground states. In the thermodynamic limit, the exact mean-field dynamics reduces to an irrational flow on a two-dimensional torus, yielding quasiperiodic order parameters with discrete spectra generated by two incommensurate fundamental frequencies. Vanishing maximal Lyapunov exponents demonstrate that the nonlinear self-consistent dynamics remains nonchaotic. Our results establish a minimal interference-induced mechanism for time-quasiperiodic order and open a route toward higher-dimensional quasiperiodic dynamics in multilevel systems.
summary: 边界时间晶体通过驱动耗散多体系统中的持续周期性振荡表现出连续时间平移对称性的自发破缺。在这里，我们表明多级干涉提供了超越周期顺序的自然途径，无需外部施加准周期驱动即可实现耗散时间准晶体。我们考虑一个集体驱动耗散四能级系综，具有两个简并激发态和两个简并基态。在热力学极限下，精确的平均场动力学简化为二维环面上的无理流，产生具有由两个不相称的基频生成的离散谱的准周期有序参数。最大李雅普诺夫指数消失表明非线性自洽动力学仍然是非混沌的。我们的结果建立了时间准周期秩序的最小干扰诱发机制，并为多级系统中的高维准周期动力学开辟了一条道路。

title: Homomorphic Quantum Error Correction
abstract: Homomorphic quantum error correction aims to protect quantum data against both unauthorized access and environmental noise during server-based processing. We investigate the algebraic compatibility between quantum homomorphic encryption and quantum error correction, determining precise conditions under which encrypted encoded states remain inside the relevant code space during storage and computation. Our work establishes a necessary and sufficient criterion for an $[[n,1,d]]$ stabilizer code to remain compatible with the restricted transversal block-Pauli masking $U_{\rm enc}(a,b)=(X^aZ^b)^{\otimes n}$, stated explicitly for $[[n,1,d]]$ codes and extending directly to code-space preservation for $[[n,k,d]]$ codes. We verify this condition for standard examples (bit-flip and Shor codes, with the phase-flip repetition code following analogously), derive a practical criterion for Calderbank-Shor-Steane codes, and extend the analysis to three-dimensional color codes. A critical challenge emerges for non-Clifford gate implementation: the Shor code lacks a naive transversal $T$-gate implementation of the desired logical operation on encrypted encoded data. We present two routes around this obstruction. First, suitable triorthogonal codes admit transversal $T$-type logical implementations, up to Clifford corrections. Second, logical-gate masking gives code-space compatibility for arbitrary stabilizer codes, provided that suitable unitary representatives of the required logical gates are available. These results separate code-space compatibility from a full cryptographic security proof and provide explicit criteria for combining error correction with homomorphic processing in cloud quantum computing.
summary:
同态量子纠错旨在保护量子数据在基于服务器的处理过程中免受未经授权的访问和环境噪声的影响。我们研究了量子同态加密和量子纠错之间的代数兼容性，确定了加密编码状态在存储和计算期间保留在相关代码空间内的精确条件。我们的工作为 $[[n,1,d]]$ 稳定器代码建立了一个必要且充分的标准，以保持与受限横向块泡利掩码 $U_{\rm enc}(a,b)=(X^aZ^b)^{\otimes n}$ 的兼容性，明确规定了 $[[n,1,d]]$ 代码，并直接扩展到 $[[n,k,d]]$ 代码的代码空间保存。我们用标准示例（位翻转和 Shor 码，相位翻转重复码类似）验证了这一条件，推导了 Calderbank-Shor-Steane 码的实用标准，并将分析扩展到三维颜色码。非 Clifford 门实现面临着一个关键挑战：Shor 代码缺乏对加密编码数据所需逻辑操作的简单横向 $T$ 门实现。

我们提出了绕过这个障碍的两条路线。首先，合适的三正交码允许横向 $T$ 型逻辑实现，直至 Clifford 校正。其次，逻辑门掩码为任意稳定器代码提供了代码空间兼容性，前提是所需逻辑门的合适的单一表示可用。这些结果将代码空间兼容性与完整的密码安全证明分开，并为云量子计算中的纠错与同态处理相结合提供了明确的标准。

title: Q-LEAK: Quantum-Based LEAKage Verification for Side-Channel Countermeasures
abstract: Formal verification of power side-channel leakage and its countermeasures in cryptographic algorithms is challenging, as SAT-based methods fail to scale on XOR-heavy, time-unrolled cryptographic circuits with realistic leakage models. We construct compact Conjunctive Normal Form (CNF) cases modeling one-bit leakage under two-trace conditions, linking key dependence and state evolution. Classical solvers quickly reach complexity limits, so we propose Q-LEAK, a quantum-based verification approach using Grover's algorithm, compiling each CNF into an oracle and applying amplitude amplification to search in O(sqrt(N)) oracle calls, with oracles that encode the two-trace leakage predicate and the CNF constraints. Benchmarking against classical SAT shows both potential gains and practical resource limits. In noiseless tests on 5-7 variable benchmarks, Q-LEAK consistently recovered a satisfying assignment within 1-4 tries, with marked bitstrings amplified clearly above the background distribution, exceeding 20 percent probability. The evaluation of Q-LEAK on real quantum hardware revealed at least one classically verified SAT assignment, despite the presence of noise. These results point to a potential path toward quantum-assisted verification of side-channel protections.
summary:
密码算法中电源侧通道泄漏及其对策的形式化验证具有挑战性，因为基于 SAT 的方法无法在具有实际泄漏模型的 XOR 密集型、时间展开的密码电路上进行扩展。我们构建了紧凑的联合范式（CNF）案例，在两条迹线条件下建模一位泄漏，将密钥依赖性和状态演化联系起来。经典求解器很快就达到了复杂性极限，因此我们提出了 Q-LEAK，这是一种使用 Grover 算法的基于量子的验证方法，将每个 CNF 编译到预言机中，并应用幅度放大在 O(sqrt(N)) 预言机调用中进行搜索，其中预言机对两迹泄漏谓词和 CNF 约束进行编码。与传统 SAT 的基准比较显示了潜在收益和实际资源限制。在 5-7 个变量基准的无噪声测试中，Q-LEAK 在 1-4 次尝试内一致恢复了令人满意的分配，标记的位串明显放大到背景分布之上，超过 20% 的概率。尽管存在噪声，但对真实量子硬件上的 Q-LEAK 评估揭示了至少一项经过经典验证的 SAT 任务。

这些结果指出了侧通道保护的量子辅助验证的潜在途径。

title: Thermalization in Spatially Extended Open Quantum Systems: Local versus Global Markovian Evolution
abstract: We investigate the dynamics of a qubit chain locally coupled to a thermal reservoir, modeled through repeated collisions with particles drawn from a heat bath. Under suitable conditions, the resulting Lindblad equation is thermodynamically consistent -- it drives the system toward thermal equilibrium -- while remaining local at short times. This framework reveals a crossover between the global Lindblad equation derived from the secular approximation in weak-coupling theory and the local dissipative models often employed in the literature, which generally fail to ensure thermodynamic consistency.
summary: 我们研究了局部耦合到储热器的量子比特链的动力学，通过与从热浴中提取的粒子的反复碰撞进行建模。在合适的条件下，得到的林德布拉德方程在热力学上是一致的——它驱动系统达到热平衡——同时在短时间内保持局部状态。该框架揭示了弱耦合理论中长期近似导出的全局 Lindblad 方程与文献中经常采用的局部耗散模型之间的交叉，而局部耗散模型通常无法确保热力学一致性。

title: Rethinking Expressibility-Trainability Trade-off in Hybrid Quantum Neural Networks
abstract: Hybrid quantum neural networks (HQNNs) integrate parameterized quantum circuits (PQCs) within classical networks, where the behavior of the underlying PQCs is often the primary focus of analysis. In this context, expressibility and trainability are widely used to characterize PQC's performance and are commonly assumed to exhibit a trade-off, where highly expressive circuits are more susceptible to barren plateaus. However, the validity of this relationship in HQNNs remains unclear. In this paper, we systematically analyze the expressibility--trainability relationship in HQNNs across varying circuit depths, qubit counts, entanglement topologies. We consider different training configurations, including pure PQCs, quantum-only training in hybrid setting, and full end-to-end training of hybrid models. Our results show that pure PQCs exhibit only a weak and regime-dependent trade-off, while hybrid architectures increasingly disrupt and can eliminate this relationship under full hybrid training. This indicates that classical components reshape the optimization landscape, decoupling trainability from PQC expressibility. We further propose a multi-objective neural architecture search (NAS) framework that jointly optimizes expressibility, trainability, and task performance over a combined classical--quantum design space, revealing different Pareto-optimal solutions under full end-to-end and quantum only training in hybrid setting. different trainability definitions. Our results suggest that hybridization is not just an implementation detail, but a defining factor in the performance of quantum machine learning models.
summary:
混合量子神经网络 (HQNN) 将参数化量子电路 (PQC) 集成到经典网络中，其中底层 PQC 的行为通常是分析的主要焦点。在这种情况下，可表达性和可训练性被广泛用于表征 PQC 的性能，并且通常被认为表现出一种权衡，其中高表达性电路更容易受到贫瘠平台的影响。然而，这种关系在 HQNN 中的有效性仍不清楚。在本文中，我们系统地分析了 HQNN 中不同电路深度、量子位计数、纠缠拓扑的可表达性-可训练性关系。我们考虑不同的训练配置，包括纯 PQC、混合环境中的纯量子训练以及混合模型的完整端到端训练。我们的结果表明，纯 PQC 仅表现出较弱且依赖于机制的权衡，而混合架构则越来越多地破坏并可以在完全混合训练下消除这种关系。这表明经典组件重塑了优化格局，将可训练性与 PQC 可表达性解耦。

我们进一步提出了一种多目标神经架构搜索（NAS）框架，该框架在组合的经典量子设计空间上联合优化可表达性、可训练性和任务性能，揭示了混合环境中完全端到端和仅量子训练下的不同帕累托最优解决方案。不同的可训练性定义。我们的结果表明，混合不仅仅是一个实现细节，而且是量子机器学习模型性能的决定性因素。

title: Boundary $0/π$ logical subspace and bulk dynamical probes in flux-controlled anomalous Floquet quantum walks
abstract: We formulate a one-dimensional flux-controlled anomalous Floquet quantum walk and show that it admits a direct microscopic realization in a driven bipartite lattice. The walk consists of a coin-dependent drift step and a momentum-dependent coin mixing step, so the same evolution operator governs quasienergy bands, boundary modes, and bulk dynamics in real space. Because the walk is chiral, the quasienergy gaps at $0$ and $\pi/T$ carry independent topological information, which organizes trivial, $0$-only, $\pi$-only, and coexistence sectors in the $(M,\phi)$ plane. In the coexistence sector, a $0$ mode and a $\pi$ mode reside on the same edge and span a natural boundary logical subspace. One Floquet period acts there as a relative phase operation and produces a clear $2T$ response in local boundary observables. In the bulk, the same anomalous Floquet structure is probed dynamically in two complementary ways. Frame-resolved mean chiral displacements approach the two winding numbers in the clean pre-reflection window of the symmetric time frames, while selected benchmark cuts at a representative $0$ gap closing and a representative $\pi$ gap closing exhibit distinct local stroboscopic responses, with the $\pi$ gap benchmark showing a much stronger odd-even alternation. The boundary logical subspace and the bulk dynamical probes are therefore organized within one flux-controlled anomalous Floquet quantum walk, suggesting a symmetry-protected route to quantum-walk information primitives in driven microstructured lattices.
summary:
我们制定了一个一维通量控制的反常 Floquet 量子行走，并表明它允许在驱动二分晶格中直接微观实现。该行走由依赖于硬币的漂移步骤和依赖于动量的硬币混合步骤组成，因此相同的演化算子控制着真实空间中的准能带、边界模式和体动力学。因为行走是手性的，所以 $0$ 和 $\pi/T$ 处的准能隙携带独立的拓扑信息，这些信息在 $(M,\phi)$ 平面上组织了琐碎的、仅 $0$、仅 $\pi$ 和共存的扇区。在共存扇区中，$0$模式和$\pi$模式位于同一边缘并跨越自然边界逻辑子空间。一个 Floquet 周期充当相对相位运算，并在局部边界可观测值中产生清晰的 $2T$ 响应。总的来说，相同的异常 Floquet 结构以两种互补的方式动态探测。

帧解析的平均手性位移接近对称时间帧的干净预反射窗口中的两个绕组数，而在代表性的 $0$ 间隙闭合和代表性的 $\pi$ 间隙闭合处选定的基准切割表现出明显的局部频闪响应，其中 $\pi$ 间隙基准显示出更强的奇偶交替。因此，边界逻辑子空间和体动力学探针被组织在一个通量控制的反常 Floquet 量子行走中，这表明在驱动微结构晶格中通往量子行走信息基元的对称保护路径。

title: Sideband fingerprints of antibunched light in cascaded quantum wave mixing
abstract: Quantum wave mixing on a single superconducting qubit produces a hierarchy of coherent side peaks associated with elastic multiphoton scattering pathways. In a cascaded source--probe geometry these pathways become sensitive to the photon statistics of the radiation emitted by the source qubit. We develop an analytical theory of this effect starting from the cascaded master equation in the weak-driving regime. In the coherent-filtering limit $\gamma_{\rm s}\gg\gamma_{\rm pr}$, the standard coherent--coherent wave-mixing hierarchy is recovered. In the opposite limit $\gamma_{\rm pr}\gg\gamma_{\rm s}$, side peaks associated with multiphoton absorption from the antibunched source field are parametrically suppressed. Numerical solutions confirm the analytical scaling laws. The resulting sideband hierarchy provides a frequency-domain fingerprint of antibunched itinerant microwave light.
summary: 单个超导量子位上的量子波混合产生与弹性多光子散射路径相关的相干侧峰层次结构。在级联源-探针几何结构中，这些路径对源量子位发射的辐射的光子统计变得敏感。我们从弱驱动状态下的级联主方程出发，发展了这种效应的分析理论。在相干滤波极限$\gamma_{\rm s}\gg\gamma_{\rm pr}$中，恢复标准相干-相干波混合层次结构。在相反的限制 $\gamma_{\rm pr}\gg\gamma_{\rm s}$ 中，与反聚束源场的多光子吸收相关的侧峰被参数抑制。数值解证实了解析标度定律。由此产生的边带层次结构提供了反聚束流动微波光的频域指纹。

title: A Variational Dissipative Framework for Quantum Algorithms
abstract: Dissipation engineering has attracted growing interest as an approach to controlling open quantum systems through engineered system-environment interactions. Standard variational quantum circuits are usually built from unitary operations and therefore explore only a restricted family of states. To go beyond this limitation, we introduce a variational dissipative framework in which ancilla-assisted engineered dissipation is incorporated into parameterized quantum algorithms. In this framework, system-only variational layers are combined with trainable dissipative modules, so that the circuit can prepare a broader class of mixed states through ancilla-assisted nonunitary transformations. Within this framework, the same ancilla-assisted dissipative block is used in two representative settings with different objectives. For ground-state search, it is integrated into a dissipative variational quantum eigensolver to improve the convergence toward low-energy states. For state recovery, it is trained as a recovery channel to suppress preparation noise and enhance fidelity with the target state. In both cases, the block is realized through parameterized system-ancilla couplings followed by ancilla reset and trace-out. Our results show that engineered dissipation can be incorporated into variational quantum circuits as a reusable trainable primitive rather than treated only as a source of noise. In this sense, the proposed framework identifies ancilla-assisted dissipative channels as a concrete variational resource that can support both optimization and recovery tasks within a unified design.
summary:
耗散工程作为一种通过工程系统-环境相互作用来控制开放量子系统的方法引起了越来越多的兴趣。标准变分量子电路通常由幺正运算构建，因此仅探索有限的状态族。为了超越这一限制，我们引入了一种变分耗散框架，其中辅助辅助工程耗散被纳入参数化量子算法中。在此框架中，仅系统变分层与可训练耗散模块相结合，以便电路可以通过辅助辅助的非酉变换准备更广泛的混合状态。在此框架内，相同的辅助辅助耗散块用于具有不同目标的两个代表性设置。对于基态搜索，它被集成到耗散变分量子本征解算器中，以提高向低能态的收敛性。对于状态恢复，它被训练为恢复通道，以抑制准备噪声并增强目标状态的保真度。

在这两种情况下，该块都是通过参数化的系统辅助耦合来实现的，然后是辅助重置和跟踪。我们的结果表明，工程耗散可以作为可重复使用的可训练基元纳入变分量子电路中，而不仅仅是作为噪声源处理。从这个意义上说，所提出的框架将辅助辅助耗散通道识别为一种具体的变分资源，可以支持统一设计中的优化和恢复任务。

title: Bargmann Zeros as a Diagnostic of the Tunneling Transition in Double-Well Quantum Systems
abstract: Complex zeros of wavefunctions represented as entire functions in Bargmann--Fock space encode structural information about the underlying quantum state. Prior work employed zero galleries of randomly generated polynomial superpositions of Fock states as visual fingerprints suitable for classification. Here we examine whether Bargmann zeros of physically realized eigenstates of one-dimensional anharmonic and double-well Hamiltonians carry a recognizable signature of the tunneling transition in the symmetric double well. Ground and first-excited eigenstates are obtained from a variational ansatz consisting of a physically motivated symbolic envelope multiplied by a small flexible correction network, trained by Rayleigh--Ritz minimization of the finite-difference Hamiltonian expectation value and validated to reproduce energies to within $\sim 10^{-5}\,\mathrm{Ha}$. The resulting wavefunctions are projected onto the harmonic-oscillator basis and the complex zeros of the truncated Bargmann polynomial are located by numerical root-finding. For harmonic and quartic-anharmonic potentials the zeros show no preferred orientation. For double-well eigenstates, by contrast, the zeros condense onto the imaginary axis. A sweep of the barrier parameter $a$ from $0.5$ to $2.3$ reveals a continuous migration of zeros toward the imaginary axis, concurrent with the exponential collapse of the tunneling splitting $\Delta(a) = E_1 - E_0$ over $3.5$ decades. This condensation is traced to a sign-alternation pattern in the Fock-coefficient spectrum that is characteristic of bimodally localized wavefunctions. The complex zero set of the Bargmann-represented wavefunction thereby provides a compact, purely analytic diagnostic for the tunneling regime of one-dimensional double-well Hamiltonians, extending the random-polynomial zero-image framework to physical eigenstates.
summary:
波函数的复零点表示为巴格曼-福克空间中的整个函数，编码有关底层量子态的结构信息。先前的工作采用随机生成的福克状态多项式叠加的零画廊作为适合分类的视觉指纹。在这里，我们检查一维非谐和双阱哈密顿量的物理实现本征态的巴格曼零点是否具有对称双阱中隧道跃迁的可识别特征。基态和第一激发本征态是从变分拟像中获得的，该变分拟像由物理驱动的符号包络乘以小型灵活校正网络组成，通过有限差分哈密顿期望值的 Rayleigh-Ritz 最小化进行训练，并经过验证以在 $\sim 10^{-5}\,\mathrm{Ha}$ 内再现能量。将所得波函数投影到谐波振荡器基础上，并通过数值求根来定位截断 Bargmann 多项式的复零点。对于谐波和四次非谐波势，零点没有表现出首选方向。

相比之下，对于双阱本征态，零点凝聚在虚轴上。势垒参数 $a$ 从 $0.5$ 到 $2.3$ 的扫描揭示了零向虚轴的连续迁移，同时隧道分裂 $\Delta(a) = E_1 - E_0$ 在 $3.5$ 几十年内呈指数崩溃。这种凝聚可以追溯到福克系数谱中的符号交替模式，该模式是双峰局域波函数的特征。因此，巴格曼表示的波函数的复零集为一维双阱哈密顿量的隧道机制提供了紧凑的纯分析诊断，将随机多项式零图像框架扩展到物理本征态。

title: PauLIB: A High-Performance Library for Processing Pauli Strings
abstract: Processing large Pauli sums is a significant bottleneck in quantum chemistry, Pauli propagation, and Pauli-based compilation. Existing frameworks often suffer from Python interpreter overhead or utilize hash-map data structures that hinder SIMD vectorization and complicate multi-threaded merging. We present PauLIB, a header-only C++20 library designed to eliminate these bottlenecks through three key architectural choices. A bit-packed binary symplectic representation that encodes each qubit in two bits, reducing Pauli multiplication to a bitwise XOR and a population count; a sorted array layout that replaces hash maps to enable branch-predictable SIMD bulk operations; and a struct-of-arrays (SoA) memory layout that exposes contiguous word arrays for explicit SIMD vectorization. Benchmarks at 500 qubits show that single Pauli string multiplication runs at 25ns per operation-14 times faster than PauliEngine and 660 times faster than Qiskit-flat across all pair counts tested. Hamiltonian outer-product multiplication is approximately 10 times faster than PauliEngine and 45 times faster than Qiskit at all tested sizes. Greedy commutation grouping, the dominant preprocessing cost in variational algorithms, achieves up to 21,000 times speedup over PennyLane, driven by the compact bit-packed representation. The compact layout reduces the memory footprint of a one-million-term Hamiltonian at 500 qubits from 1,036MB (Qiskit) to 142MB, a 7.3 times reduction that directly enables larger problem sizes within a fixed memory budget. PauLIB is open source and provides C++ and Python interfaces.
summary:
处理大泡利和是量子化学、泡利传播和基于泡利的编译中的一个重要瓶颈。现有框架通常会受到 Python 解释器开销的影响，或者利用哈希映射数据结构来阻碍 SIMD 矢量化并使多线程合并变得复杂。我们推出了 PauLIB，这是一个仅包含头文件的 C++20 库，旨在通过三个关键架构选择来消除这些瓶颈。位打包二进制辛表示，将每个量子位编码为两位，将泡利乘法减少为按位异或和总体计数；排序数组布局取代哈希映射以实现分支可预测的 SIMD 批量操作；以及一个数组结构 (SoA) 内存布局，它公开连续的字数组以进行显式 SIMD 矢量化。 500 个量子位的基准测试显示，单个 Pauli 串乘法每次操作的运行时间为 25 纳秒，比 PauliEngine 快 14 倍，比 Qiskit 快 660 倍，在所有测试的对计数中均保持平坦。在所有测试尺寸下，哈密顿外积乘法大约比 PauliEngine 快 10 倍，比 Qiskit 快 45 倍。

贪婪交换分组是变分算法中主要的预处理成本，在紧凑的位压缩表示的驱动下，比 PennyLane 实现了高达 21,000 倍的加速。紧凑的布局将 500 个量子位的一百万项哈密顿量的内存占用量从 1,036MB (Qiskit) 减少到 142MB，减少了 7.3 倍，可以在固定的内存预算内直接实现更大的问题规模。 PauLIB 是开源的，提供 C++ 和 Python 接口。

title: Training-Free Quantum Generative Paradigm via Local Parent Hamiltonians
abstract: We propose a training-free quantum generative paradigm, which is fundamentally different from current generative models, which demand substantial computational power, face practical scalability limits, and often function as opaque black boxes, despite their remarkable success. We enable image and text generation without parameter training, by constructing a local parent Hamiltonian whose ground state encodes the target distribution and then solving the global Hamiltonian. Rooted directly in quantum mechanical principles, this approach establishes a new pathway for generative modeling that leverages superposition and entanglement to maintain global consistency.
summary: 我们提出了一种免训练的量子生成范式，它与当前的生成模型有根本的不同，当前的生成模型需要大量的计算能力，面临实际的可扩展性限制，并且通常充当不透明的黑匣子，尽管它们取得了显着的成功。我们通过构造一个本地父哈密顿量（其基态对目标分布进行编码），然后求解全局哈密顿量，无需参数训练即可生成图像和文本。这种方法直接植根于量子力学原理，为生成建模建立了一条新途径，利用叠加和纠缠来保持全局一致性。

title: Toward General Quantum Control with Physics-Informed Large Language Models
abstract: Quantum control is essential for quantum information science and technology, yet designing high-fidelity control protocols remains challenging due to complex optimization landscapes, hardware noise, and long pulse sequences. Existing numerical solvers often require problem-specific engineering and produce opaque control amplitudes, while naive large language models (LLMs) lack the physical consistency and long-horizon precision for reliable quantum control synthesis. Here we introduce VF-QCTRL, a physics-informed large language model framework for general quantum control that combines symbolic reasoning with optimization to propose analytic control ansätze and coherently refine their parameters through feedback. To systematically evaluate LLM-driven quantum control, we develop QCTRL-BENCH, a benchmark spanning sixteen tasks across single- and multi-qubit systems, closed and open quantum dynamics, noiseless and noisy settings, and both analytic and numerical protocols. Across the benchmark, VF-QCTRL demonstrates strong universality, accuracy, efficiency, and interpretability: it applies to generic quantum control systems without task-specific training, achieves performance competitive with or exceeding state-of-the-art conventional solvers in both noiseless and noisy regimes with query efficiency, exhibits favorable inference-time scaling and pulse resolution scaling, and derives physically interpretable analytical protocols directly from prompts. Our results establish physics-informed LLM-based quantum control as a promising paradigm for accurate, efficient, interpretable, and training-free quantum control protocol design across a broad range of quantum systems.
summary:
量子控制对于量子信息科学和技术至关重要，但由于复杂的优化环境、硬件噪声和长脉冲序列，设计高保真控制协议仍然具有挑战性。现有的数值求解器通常需要针对特定​​问题的工程并产生不透明的控制幅度，而朴素的大型语言模型（LLM）缺乏可靠的量子控制合成的物理一致性和长范围精度。在这里，我们介绍 VF-QCTRL，一种用于通用量子控制的基于物理的大型语言模型框架，它将符号推理与优化相结合，提出分析控制 ansätze 并通过反馈连贯地细化其参数。为了系统地评估 LLM 驱动的量子控制，我们开发了 QCTRL-BENCH，这是一个涵盖单量子位和多量子位系统、封闭和开放量子动力学、无噪声和噪声设置以及分析和数值协议的 16 个任务的基准。

在整个基准测试中，VF-QCTRL 表现出了强大的通用性、准确性、效率和可解释性：它适用于无需特定任务训练的通用量子控制系统，在无噪声和噪声条件下实现了与最先进的传统求解器竞争或超过最先进的传统求解器的性能，并具有查询效率，表现出良好的推理时间缩放和脉冲分辨率缩放，并直接从提示导出物理可解释的分析协议。我们的研究结果将基于物理学的 LLM 量子控制确立为一种有前途的范例，可在广泛的量子系统中进行准确、高效、可解释和免训练的量子控制协议设计。

title: Rounding Almost Commuting Hamiltonians
abstract: Commuting Hamiltonians lie at the boundary between classical constraint satisfaction and quantum many-body physics, exhibiting rich quantum structure while remaining more tractable than general noncommuting models. In contrast, physical Hamiltonians are rarely exactly commuting, which naturally motivates the study of almost commuting Hamiltonians. Despite their relevance, the implications of approximate commutation are only poorly understood. In this work, we show how to efficiently approximate any almost commuting $2$-local qubit Hamiltonian by a commuting one: we give a locality-preserving algorithmic rounding technique that maps any $2$-local Hamiltonian $H=\sum_{i=1}^m h_i$ with $\|[h_i,h_j]\| \leq \epsilon$ to a nearby Hamiltonian $\hat{H}$ whose terms pair-wise commute, and which is within overall distance $\|H-\hat{H}\| = O(m\,\epsilon^{1/6})$. As a consequence, we show that $\delta$-approximations to the ground energy for $\epsilon$-almost commuting $2$-local qubit Hamiltonians lie in $\mathsf{NP}$ when $\delta \gg m\epsilon^{1/6}$, extending the classical containment well beyond the commuting setting. Finally, we present two applications of our rounding framework: Gibbs sampling and fast Hamiltonian simulation for almost commuting systems.
summary:
通勤哈密顿量位于经典约束满足和量子多体物理之间的边界，表现出丰富的量子结构，同时比一般的非通勤模型更容易处理。相比之下，物理哈密顿量很少是完全通勤的，这自然激发了对几乎通勤哈密顿量的研究。尽管近似换向具有相关性，但人们对它的影响却知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何通过交换量子位哈密顿量来有效地逼近任何几乎交换的 $2$ 局部量子位哈密顿量：我们给出了一种保留局部性的算法舍入技术，该技术将任何 $2$ 局部哈密顿量 $H=\sum_{i=1}^m h_i$ 映射到 $\|[h_i,h_j]\| \leq \epsilon$ 到附近的哈密顿量 $\hat{H}$，其项成对交换，并且在总距离 $\|H-\hat{H}\| 内= O(m\,\epsilon^{1/6})$。因此，我们表明，当 $\delta \gg m\epsilon^{1/6}$ 时，$\delta$-几乎通勤 $2$-本地量子位哈密顿量的地面能量近似位于 $\mathsf{NP}$，将经典遏制远远超出了通勤设置。

最后，我们提出了舍入框架的两个应用：吉布斯采样和几乎通勤系统的快速哈密顿模拟。
